In Japan, these challenges are amplified by species-specific metabolic differences and reporting practices defined by the Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry, and Fisheries (MAFF). Most prior work relies on prediction-oriented models, limiting mechanistic interpretability. This study proposes a regulatory-integrated unsupervised framework for pattern discovery using the National Veterinary Assay Laboratory (NVAL) database. ADEs are encoded into organ system-aligned representations and adjusted for species-specific reporting biases, enabling cross-species comparison. Similarity-based clustering and dimensionality reduction are applied to identify latent toxicity structures. Analysis of 4,120 high-confidence ADE reports (9,080 drug-ADE combinations) identified three significant species clusters (p < 0.01), including hepatic-dominant patterns in companion animals (0.42 $\pm$ 0.06), renal toxicity in ruminants (0.39 $\pm$ 0.07), and dermatological sensitivity in sheep (0.35 $\pm$ 0.07). Drug-level clustering achieved 83% alignment with pharmacological classes, while cosine similarity outperformed alternative metrics (silhouette score: 0.48; cluster precision: 87%). Regulatory validation showed strong agreement with established classifications. These findings demonstrate that regulation-aligned unsupervised analysis can uncover biologically meaningful, region-specific toxicity patterns, providing an interpretable and scalable framework for veterinary drug safety assessment.

</details>


### [297] [Evaluating Agentic Configuration Repair for Computer Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06212)
*Rufat Asadli,Benjamin Hoffman,Ioannis Protogeros,Laurent Vanbever*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究利用大语言模型（LLMs）结合形式化网络验证和上下文检索工具，采用代理架构自动修复网络配置错误。实验表明，代理架构在修复效果（平均提升12%）和安全性（平均提升17%）上均优于基础LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络配置错误是导致关键互联网中断的主要根源，而手动修复复杂且易错，因此研究转向利用LLM自动化处理这一任务。

Method: 对开源和闭源LLM进行基准测试，为其增强形式化网络验证工具和上下文检索工具，采用代理架构（agentic architectures）实现动态上下文管理和迭代配置修复验证。

Result: 代理架构在修复效果上平均提升12%，在安全性上平均提升17%。

Conclusion: 代理架构通过动态管理上下文和迭代验证配置修复的能力，显著提升了LLM在网络配置修复任务中的效果和安全性。

Abstract: Misconfigurations in computer networks remain a major source of critical Internet outages. Research is turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the complex, error-prone task of network configuration. However, even state-of-the-art models fail to resolve misconfigurations in large-scale, complex scenarios and often introduce new errors. In this work, we benchmark open- and closed-source LLMs augmented with formal network verification and context retrieval tools. We demonstrate that agentic architectures outperform base LLMs in repair efficacy (by 12% on average) and safety (by 17% on average), enabled by the ability to dynamically manage context and iteratively validate configuration repairs.

</details>


### [298] [From Reward-Hack Activations to Agentic Risk States: Context-Calibrated Mechanistic Monitoring in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06223)
*Patrick Wilhelm,Odej Kao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究ReAct风格语言模型代理中的奖励黑客监控问题，发现基于激活的奖励黑客分数能识别潜在策略状态但不足以预测即时利用行为，需结合熵和决策上下文特征进行风险评估，并通过激活方向引导减少代理中的代理奖励利用行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型代理在反复观察、推理和行动选择的循环中运作，安全监控需要同时关注内部模型状态和环境上下文，但现有方法对奖励黑客行为的检测和缓解不足。

Method: 在Gameable ALFWorld和WebShop环境中构建ReAct风格代理，使用基于激活的奖励黑客分数、token级熵和决策上下文特征进行监控，并通过School-of-Reward-Hacks数据集微调适配器，采用激活方向引导进行缓解。

Result: 适配器能迁移奖励黑客倾向到代理行动选择中；高奖励黑客激活能识别潜在策略状态但不保证立即利用行为；熵和上下文校准的内部特征能提升风险估计；激活方向引导在特定混合适配器设置中减少代理奖励利用行为。

Conclusion: 上下文校准的内部监控对代理安全至关重要：奖励黑客激活识别潜在策略状态，熵和决策上下文帮助判断该状态何时转化为风险行动，单一依赖激活动力学不足以缓解奖励黑客行为。

Abstract: Language-model agents act through repeated cycles of observation, reasoning, and action selection, making safety monitoring depend on both internal model state and environment context. We study reward-hacking monitors in ReAct-style agents acting in Gameable ALFWorld and WebShop. Agents are instrumented with activation-based reward-hack scores, token-level entropy, and decision-context features. We find that adapters fine-tuned on \textit{School-of-Reward-Hacks} dataset can transfer reward-hack tendencies into agentic action selection, especially when the environment exposes proxy-reward affordances. However, mitigating such behavior cannot rely on activation dynamics alone. High reward-hack activation identifies a latent policy state, but does not necessarily imply an immediate exploit action. Across next-step prediction tasks, entropy and context-calibrated internal features improve risk estimation over reward-hack activation alone. Activation-direction steering further reduces proxy-exploit behavior in selected mixed-adapter regimes. Overall, our results support context-calibrated internal monitoring for agents: reward-hack activation identifies a latent policy state, while entropy and decision context help determine when that state becomes risky action.

</details>


### [299] [Closing the Loop on Latent Reasoning via Test-Time Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06252)
*Xiaopeng Yuan,Haibo Jin,Ye Yu,Peng Kuang,Lijun Yu,Yushun Dong,Haohan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ReLAT是一种自监督测试时训练方法，通过查询重建损失将潜在推理状态锚定到原始问题，从而在减少token开销的同时保持可检查性，显著提升了数学推理、知识问答和代码生成任务的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在推理方法虽然减少了token开销，但失去了文本推理中中间状态可检查的优势，导致潜在状态可能偏离原始查询约束而无法被检测，形成"开环"推理。

Method: 构建可微分的"问题→潜在思维→问题"循环，在答案生成前计算查询重建损失，通过自监督方式优化潜在状态，使其忠实保留原始查询信息。

Result: 在数学推理、知识问答、代码生成基准上一致优于单模型推理、文本协作、开环潜在协作及其他测试时训练方法。在Qwen3-8B上，AIME 2024准确率从56.7%提升至73.3%，比最强开环基线高出16.6个百分点。

Conclusion: 查询重建损失能有效将潜在推理状态锚定到问题规范，实现可检查的闭环潜在推理，在不牺牲效率的前提下恢复文本推理的核心优势。

Abstract: Recent work moves intermediate reasoning from natural-language traces into latent or cache-level representations to reduce token overhead and avoid a discrete communication bottleneck. However, this shift also removes a key advantage of textual reasoning: intermediate states are no longer inspectable, making it difficult to determine whether a latent state still preserves the constraints of the original query. As a result, latent reasoning typically operates in an open loop, where a latent state is produced and consumed without an input-anchored fidelity check. We propose ReLAT (Reconstruction-Guided Latent Reasoning At Test Time), a self-supervised test-time training method that closes this loop using the query itself as the reference. Our key observation is that if a latent state faithfully represents a query, the query should be recoverable from it; if the query cannot be recovered, the latent state has lost task-relevant information. ReLAT operationalizes this principle by constructing a differentiable Question -> Latent Thought -> Question cycle and optimizing query reconstruction loss through the latent thought before answer generation. This anchors opaque latent computation to the problem specification it is supposed to represent. Across mathematical reasoning, knowledge QA, and code generation benchmarks on the Qwen family, ReLAT consistently improves over single-model inference, text-based collaboration, open-loop latent collaboration, and alternative test-time training objectives. On Qwen3-8B, ReLAT raises AIME 2024 accuracy from 56.7% to 73.3%, a 16.6-point gain over the strongest open-loop latent baseline.

</details>


### [300] [RedKnot: Efficient Long-Context LLM Serving with Head-Aware KV Reuse and SegPagedAttention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06256)
*Yang Liu,ZhaoKai Luo,HuaYi Jin,ZhiYong Wang,RuoZhou He,BoYu Wang,Guanjie Chen,Junhao Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RedKnot 提出了一种基于注意力头（head-aware）的 KV 缓存管理系统，将传统单一的 KV 缓存按注意力头分解为结构化内存对象，从而统一支持位置无关的 KV 复用、前缀 KV 压缩、热/冷 KV 分离和分布式 KV 放置，无需模型重训练或微调，显著提升资源效率和服务可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型服务中输入长度不断增长，KV 缓存已成为 AI 基础设施的主要瓶颈，限制了 GPU 内存容量、服务并发性、缓存复用和分布式可扩展性。现有系统大多将 KV 缓存视为同质的 token 级内存块序列，忽略了不同注意力头之间的功能角色、关注距离和运行时重要性的显著差异。

Method: RedKnot 打破了传统的单一 KV 缓存抽象，按注意力头（KV heads）对 KV 缓存进行分解。不同头部在不同服务场景下表现出不同的功能角色、有效注意力范围和运行时重要性。通过这种头部级分解，KV 缓存从单一的张量抽象转变为结构化的内存对象。

Result: RedKnot 能够统一支持位置无关的 KV 复用、前缀 KV 压缩、热/冷 KV 分离和分布式 KV 放置，在保持输出保真度的同时提高资源效率，且无需模型重训练或微调。

Conclusion: RedKnot 通过将 KV 缓存从单一的、被动的运行时工件转变为动态的、模型感知的运行时基础，为可扩展的大语言模型服务建立了新的 AI 基础设施基础。

Abstract: As the input length of large language model (LLM) serving continues to grow, the KV cache has become a dominant bottleneck in AI infrastructure. It limits GPU memory capacity, serving concurrency, cache reuse, and distributed scalability. Several important problems, including position-independent KV cache, prefix KV cache compression, hot/cold KV cache separation, and distributed KV cache management, all depend on how the KV cache is represented and managed. However, existing serving systems largely rely on a monolithic KV cache abstraction, where the KV cache is treated as a homogeneous sequence of token-level memory blocks and managed with similar policies across attention heads and serving scenarios. We observe that KV cache utility is highly structured across KV heads: different heads exhibit different functional roles, attention distances, and runtime importance. Therefore, a full KV cache is not always necessary for every head, token range, or serving scenario.
  We present RedKnot, a head-aware KV cache management system for LLM serving. RedKnot breaks the conventional monolithic KV cache abstraction by decomposing the KV cache along KV heads, whose importance and effective attention ranges vary significantly across serving scenarios. This head-level decomposition turns the KV cache from a monolithic tensor abstraction into a structured memory object, enabling RedKnot to uniformly support position-independent KV reuse, prefix KV compression, hot/cold KV separation, and distributed KV placement while preserving output fidelity and improving resource efficiency, without requiring model retraining or fine-tuning. RedKnot establishes a new foundation for AI infrastructure by transforming the KV cache from a monolithic, passive runtime artifact into a dynamic, model-aware runtime substrate for scalable LLM serving.

</details>


### [301] [ToolChoiceConfusion: Causal Minimal Tool Filtering for Reliable LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06284)
*Rahul Suresh Babu,Laxmipriya Ganesh Iyer*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出因果最小工具过滤（CMTF）方法，通过因果充分性而非语义相关性选择工具，在保持任务成功率的同时将每步可见工具从100个减至1个，token消耗降低约90%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具选择方法多基于语义相关性，但相关性不足以确保工具在当前步骤是必要或适时的，导致错误调用、过早行动和token浪费。

Method: CMTF：一种免训练方法，利用轻量级前置条件-效果合约，基于因果充分性筛选出从当前状态推进到用户目标所需的最小下一步工具集合。

Result: 在102个任务、100个工具、4种LLM后端、2448次实验的基准测试中，CMTF在总体成功率上匹配最强因果基线，同时将可见工具从100个降至每步1个，token使用减少约90%。

Conclusion: 语义相关性不足以指导工具选择，基于因果充分性的方法能在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅提升效率。

Abstract: Large language model agents increasingly rely on external tools, but larger tool menus can reduce reliability and efficiency by increasing wrong-tool calls, premature actions, and token cost. Existing tool-selection methods often optimize semantic relevance, exposing tools whose names or descriptions match the user request. We argue that relevance is insufficient: a tool may be related to the task while still being unnecessary or premature at the current step.
  We propose Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF), a training-free method that selects tools by causal sufficiency. CMTF uses lightweight precondition-effect contracts to expose only the minimal next-step tool frontier needed to advance from the current state toward the user goal. Across multi-step tool-use tasks, we compare CMTF with all-tools exposure, keyword retrieval, state-aware filtering, and causal-path ablations, measuring task success, wrong-tool calls, premature actions, tool exposure, and token cost. In the main benchmark with 102 tasks, 100 tools, four LLM backends, and 2448 task-method-model runs, CMTF matches the strongest causal baseline in aggregate success while reducing visible tools from 100 to one per step and reducing token usage by about 90% relative to all-tools exposure.

</details>


### [302] [TRACE: A Temporal Conditional Estimation for Multimodal Time Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06285)
*Ziwen Kan,Yishuo Chen,Kecheng Li,Andrew Wen,Xiaomeng Wang,Liwei Wang,Jihao Duan,Song Wang,Hongfang Liu,Tianlong Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出TRACE框架，一种条件估计范式，用于处理多模态时间序列基础模型中的时间不对齐和模态缺失问题，在医疗和情感计算基准上优于现有融合方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的多模态时间序列模型在处理时间不对齐和部分模态缺失时，通常使用简单的插补或掩码策略，未能捕捉跨模态依赖关系，导致表示质量下降。

Method: 提出TRACE条件估计范式，可从可用的辅助模态中系统推断缺失的目标模态，专门解决多模态时间序列中的缺失和不规则采样问题。

Result: 在MIMIC-IV、CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI等多个基准上，TRACE在多种下游预测任务和缺失模态设置下持续优于现有融合方法，对严重模态缺失具有更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TRACE为多模态时间序列基础模型提供了一种更可靠的跨模态表示学习方案，有效应对了现实世界中的模态缺失和异步采样挑战。

Abstract: Time series foundation models (TS-FMs) aim to learn generalizable temporal representations that can be adapted to a wide range of downstream tasks. In real-world multimodal settings, time series are frequently affected by temporal misalignment and partial modality missingness, where different modalities are observed at heterogeneous time scales or are partially absent. Existing approaches typically rely on naive imputation or masking strategies, which fail to account for cross-modal dependencies and often lead to misaligned or degraded representations. We propose TRACE, a conditional estimation paradigm for multimodal time series foundation model pipelines under missingness and irregular sampling, allowing incomplete target modalities to be systematically inferred from available auxiliary modalities. We evaluate TRACE on diverse multimodal benchmarks spanning healthcare and affective computing, including the MIMIC-IV clinical dataset and the CMU-MOSI and CMU-MOSEI benchmarks for multimodal sentiment analysis. Across a range of downstream prediction tasks and missing-modality settings, TRACE consistently outperforms prior multimodal fusion approaches, demonstrating improved robustness to severe modality missingness and more reliable cross-modal representations.

</details>


### [303] [Multi-ResNets for Subspace Preconditioning in Constrained Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06300)
*Merve Karakas,Christopher J. Williams,Emmanuel O. Balogun,Sadegh Sadeghi Tabas,Christian Brown,Nikhil Rao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MResOpt，一种分阶段残差神经网络架构，用于约束优化问题，通过优先级分解约束满足，在合成基准和电力系统最优潮流任务上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法处理约束优化问题时，难以有效处理多优先级约束，且缺乏对约束间序贯结构的利用。

Method: 设计分阶段残差网络，通过中间重补全和阶段感知损失实现约束的优先级分解；在无限宽理想化条件下可退化为序贯高斯过程回归。

Result: 在合成QP、QCQP、SOCP基准上，分阶段架构在凸和非凸设置下均改善了高优先级约束满足；在交流最优潮流任务上，实现了比重投影基线更低的高优先级违规，同时保持计算高效。

Conclusion: MResOpt有效支持了基于领域知识的约束优先级排序和学习分工，在保持效率的同时显著提升关键约束的满足度。

Abstract: We propose MResOpt, a staged residual neural network architecture for constrained optimization problems. Our architecture fits within predict-complete-correct pipelines and decomposes constraint satisfaction by priority through intermediate re-completion and stage-aware losses. The framework enables domain-informed ordered constraint satisfaction which allows the network to utilize ordinal structure when present. Under an idealized infinite-width regime, we show that our design behaves as sequential Gaussian Process regression. On synthetic QP, QCQP, and SOCP benchmarks, the staged architecture improves high-priority constraint satisfaction across convex and non-convex settings. On line-flow-constrained AC optimal power flow, we introduce a physics-motivated constraint ordering and show that MResOpt supports a learned division of labor that keeps iterates on the equality manifold, achieving substantially lower high-priority violation than reprojected baselines while remaining computationally efficient.

</details>


### [304] [AIS-Based Vessel Trajectory Prediction Using Memory-Augmented Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06311)
*Wonmo Koo,Sanha Chang,Heeyoung Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文实证研究了基于外部记忆的船舶轨迹预测方法，使用AIS数据在墨西哥湾和纽约湾的实验中，相比无记忆的深度学习基线模型，该方法在性能上取得了一致且显著的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管记忆增强神经网络在行人和道路车辆轨迹预测中表现出色，但该方法在船舶轨迹预测领域的潜力尚未被充分探索。

Method: 采用记忆增强神经网络，利用AIS（自动识别系统）数据，从外部记忆中选择性检索相关信息进行轨迹预测。

Result: 在墨西哥湾和纽约湾的数据集上，记忆增强模型相比无外部记忆的多种深度学习基线模型，在性能上取得了一致且显著的提升。

Conclusion: 外部记忆机制能够有效提升船舶轨迹预测的准确性，证明记忆增强网络在 maritime 领域具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: Accurate vessel trajectory prediction is essential for safe and efficient maritime operations, enabling collision avoidance and supporting route optimization. Although memory-augmented neural networks have recently shown strong performance in pedestrian and road-vehicle trajectory prediction by selectively retrieving relevant information from an external memory, their potential for vessel trajectory prediction remains underexplored. This paper presents an empirical investigation of memory-based trajectory prediction using Automatic Identification System (AIS) data. Experiments on data from the Gulf of Mexico and the New York Bight demonstrate consistent and substantial performance gains over a range of deep learning baselines that do not incorporate an external memory.

</details>


### [305] [LLM Self-Recognition: Steering and Retrieving Activation Signatures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06315)
*Thibaud Ardoin,Jonas Schäfer,Gerhard Wunder*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用LLM内部表征进行自我文本归因的方法，通过向残差流注入随机稀疏向量创建可检测指纹，在保证生成质量的前提下，实现对特定LLM生成文本的准确归因（>98%准确率）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI文本检测方法通常依赖外部嵌入信号或统计特征，但这些方法易被规避且推广性差。作者发现LLM在生成文本中隐式编码了自我识别信号，希望利用这一自然表征结构实现可靠、无损的文本归因。

Method: 在生成过程中向LLM的内部残差流注入随机稀疏向量（steering），从而创建独特的可检测指纹。然后使用另一个LLM作为检测器，从激活空间中恢复该信号，实现文本到特定模型的归因。

Result: 在多种检测设置下实现了超过98%的准确率，且生成的文本质量未出现下降。该方法在低熵场景下仍然可靠，即使是对抗性检测也能保持高精度。

Conclusion: LLM的激活空间中存在可利用的结构，可以通过轻量级干预编码信号而不引起语义干扰。该方法为AI生成内容归因提供了一种无需外部嵌入的实用替代方案，利用模型自然的表征结构实现了可靠的多模型识别。

Abstract: Recent advances in interpretability suggest that large language models (LLMs) implicitly encode signals in their generated text that enable self-recognition of their outputs. We demonstrate that this capability is reliable, even in low-entropy scenarios, and that it can be amplified through targeted intervention. By steering the internal residual stream during generation with a random sparse vector, we create a detectable fingerprint that enables attribution of a given text to a specific LLM. This signal is recoverable from the activations of an LLM used as a detector, achieving over 98% accuracy across multiple detection settings while preserving the quality of generated text. As AI-generated content proliferates, this approach offers a practical alternative to traditional detectors by leveraging the model's natural representation structure for attribution rather than embedding a signal externally. Our contributions include: (i) establishing reliable self-recognition capabilities in LLMs, (ii) a simple steering mechanism enabling multi-LLM identification with no quality degradation, (iii) demonstrating that activation spaces contain exploitable structure for encoding signals without semantic interference.

</details>


### [306] [DragOn: A Benchmark and Dataset for Drag-Based GUI Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06322)
*Nathan Bout,Maxime Langevin,Ronan Riochet*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DragOn是一个拖拽操作基准数据集，包含286K训练截图和3.5M训练任务，覆盖文本高亮、单元格选择、元素调整大小和滑块操作四个领域，可提升现有模型在计算机操作任务中的拖拽能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉GUI代理在点击定位任务上进展显著，但拖拽操作（如拖放、滑动、高亮）的数据规模小一个数量级，导致模型在复杂拖拽交互上表现不佳。

Method: 构建DragOn基准数据集和训练数据集，涵盖文本高亮、单元格选择、元素调整大小和滑块操作四个领域，包含286K训练截图和3.5M训练任务，外加2000个样本的评估集。

Result: 评估了专有模型（GPT、Claude）和开源模型（Qwen、Kimi、Holo），以及在训练数据上微调的Qwen VLM，结果表明该数据集能提升最先进模型在下游计算机操作任务上的性能。

Conclusion: DragOn数据集能有效提升模型在拖拽类GUI交互任务中的表现，弥补了现有数据在拖拽操作领域的不足。

Abstract: GUI agents - vision-based models that control desktops, web browsers, and mobile devices through graphical user interfaces - promise to automate a wide range of digital tasks. While million-scale datasets have enabled substantial progress on click-grounding, drag grounding (e.g. drag-and-drop, swipe, highlight) data remains an order of magnitude smaller and current models fall short on complex drag-based interactions. We introduce DragOn, a drag grounding benchmark and training dataset covering four domains: text highlighting, cell selection, element resizing and slider manipulation. The dataset comprises 286K training screenshots and 3.5M training tasks, plus a 2000-example held-out evaluation suite. We evaluate proprietary (GPT, Claude) and open-weight (Qwen, Kimi, Holo) models, as well as a Qwen VLM fine-tuned on our training data. Results suggest that our dataset could improve performance of state-of-the-art models on downstream computer-use tasks.

</details>


### [307] [TokenMizer: Graph-Structured Session Memory for Long-Horizon LLM Context Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06337)
*Shweta Mishra*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TokenMizer 是一个开源代理系统，通过将 LLM 会话历史建模为类型化知识图谱（14种节点、7种边），结合混合提取流水线、三层检查点系统和8层压缩管道，将会话历史压缩为平均78 token的简历块，在保持更高决策召回率（+9-17%）的同时，相比基线方法减少2倍token开销，并保留决策背后的原理而非仅仅提及的技术名称。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在长时任务中受限于上下文窗口大小，当历史超过最大有效上下文窗口（MECW）时，关键结构化信息（如架构决策、任务转换、文件历史）会被静默丢弃。现有缓解方案将历史视为扁平文本，破坏了会话可恢复所需的关系结构。

Method: TokenMizer 包含：1) 14节点类型和7边类型的知识图谱建模会话历史；2) 混合提取流水线增量构建图谱；3) 三层检查点系统序列化为紧凑简历块；4) 8层压缩流水线减少上下文开销；5) 语义缓存降低重复查询延迟；6) 模糊标签匹配作为主要优化手段。

Result: 在21个会话（5个领域）的基准测试中：1) 简历块平均78 token（范围42-124），比基线（159-170 token）小2倍；2) 决策召回率高9-17个百分点；3) 平均任务召回率51.0%、决策召回率46.6%、文件召回率58.7%；4) 消融实验显示模糊标签匹配贡献+33 pp任务召回率；5) 启发式压缩实现47.3% token减少且无外部依赖。

Conclusion: TokenMizer 提供了一种可查询的替代方案，以一半的token成本实现优于纯文本保留基线的性能，特别适合需要保留决策原理而非单纯提及技术名称的长时任务场景。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) deployments for long-horizon tasks face a fundamental constraint: context windows are finite while productive work sessions are not. When history exceeds the Maximum Effective Context Window (MECW), critical structured information - architectural decisions, task transitions, file histories - is silently discarded. Existing mitigations treat history as flat text, destroying the relational structure that makes sessions resumable. We present TokenMizer, an open-source proxy system that models LLM session history as a typed knowledge graph. The schema defines 14 node types and 7 edge types. A hybrid extraction pipeline populates the graph incrementally, while a three-tier checkpoint system serializes it into compact resume blocks. An 8-layer compression pipeline reduces context overhead, and a semantic cache reduces repeated-query latency. Evaluated on a controlled benchmark of 21 sessions spanning 5 domains, TokenMizer demonstrates significant token economy. It produces resume blocks averaging 78 tokens (range: 42-124) - 2x smaller than evaluated baselines (159-170 tokens) - while achieving higher decision recall (+9-17 percentage points). Crucially, baselines only preserve that a technology was mentioned; TokenMizer preserves the rationale. Across all sessions, TokenMizer achieves mean task recall 51.0%, decision recall 46.6%, and file recall 58.7%. Variance reflects domain heterogeneity: explicit imperative phrasing (software engineering) scores higher than implicit reasoning (research). Ablation studies show fuzzy label matching is the dominant improvement factor (+33 pp task recall). The heuristic compression achieves 47.3% token reduction with zero external dependencies. TokenMizer provides a queryable alternative to text-retention baselines at half the token cost.

</details>


### [308] [Boosting Brain-to-Image Decoding with TRIBE v2 Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06345)
*Yohann Benchetrit,Marlène Careil,Simon Dahan,Hubert Banville,Stéphane d'Ascoli,Jean-Rémi King*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究利用大规模fMRI编码模型TRIBE v2生成的合成数据来增强小样本fMRI数据集，从而提升图像解码性能。实验表明，在7T NSD和3T BOLD5000数据集上，Top-10图像检索准确率最高提升68%，且纯合成数据训练的解码器也能达到高于随机水平的性能，支持零样本脑到图像的解码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑解码任务受限于标记神经数据的稀缺性，在低数据量场景下表现不佳。作者希望探索是否可以通过预训练的fMRI响应模型生成合成数据来扩增小样本数据集，从而提升解码性能。

Method: 使用大规模编码模型TRIBE v2（预训练于1000+小时的fMRI视频、音频和语言响应数据）生成合成fMRI数据，用于扩增两个真实fMRI数据集（7T NSD和3T BOLD5000）。系统性地变化合成数据与真实数据的比例，评估不同配置下图像解码器的Top-10检索准确率。

Result: 1) 合成数据扩增后，Top-10图像检索准确率最高可提升68%。2) 达到特定解码性能所需的最优合成数据比例因数据源而异。3) 仅使用合成fMRI数据训练的解码器在某些设定下也能高于随机水平，实现零样本脑到图像解码。

Conclusion: 大规模fMRI响应模型（如TRIBE v2）能够有效提升脑解码的数据效率，即使在没有真实训练数据的情况下也能实现一定程度的零样本解码。这为克服脑解码中数据稀缺问题提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Brain decoding is limited by the availability of labeled neural data, and remains challenging in low-data regimes. To address this issue, we investigate whether and when brain decoding can be boosted by augmenting small fMRI datasets with synthetic data generated by a pretrained model of fMRI responses to stimuli. We use TRIBE v2, a large encoding model pretrained on more than 1000 hours of fMRI responses to video, audio and language. For each dataset, we evaluate systematic grids that show how the performance of image decoders varies with the amount of synthetic data used for training. Our results, based on two datasets (the 7T fMRI Natural Scenes Dataset and 3T fMRI BOLD5000), show up to 68% improvement in Top-10 image-retrieval accuracy compared to decoders trained only on real data. Importantly, the proportion of augmented data required to reach a given image decoding performance needs to be adjusted depending on the data source. Surprisingly, image decoders trained exclusively on synthetic fMRI can perform above chance in some settings, suggesting that TRIBE v2 can support zero-shot brain-to-image decoding. Together, these results show how large-scale models of the fMRI responses to sight, sound and language may provide a foundation to improve the data efficiency for image decoding.

</details>


### [309] [Where Should Knowledge Enter? A Layered Framework for Knowledge Infusion in Multimodal Iterative Generative Mo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06356)
*Renjith Prasad,Chathurangi Shyalika,Anushka Pawar,Amit Sheth*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出知识注入迭代生成模型本质上是一个干预层问题，将生成过程分解为四个结构组件（输入/输出边界、转移函数、中间状态、模型参数），映射为四个干预层（表面层、轨迹层、潜层、参数层），并在扩散模型中实例化该框架。通过在安全对齐实验中累积实施三个层，知识违规输出减少70.97%，验证了框架的互补性预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识注入方法按技术分类而非按生成过程的哪个组件被修改来分类，缺乏统一的结构化视角。作者认为知识注入本质上是一个干预层问题，需要一个系统框架来理解不同方法如何作用于生成轨迹的不同组件。

Method: 将迭代生成过程视为内部状态轨迹，识别知识可作用的四个结构组件：输入/输出边界、转移函数、中间状态、模型参数，对应四个干预层（表面、轨迹、潜层、参数）。在扩散模型中实例化该框架，并在安全对齐实验中用多模态知识图谱和两个扩散主干，累积实施表面层（输入侧和输出侧）和轨迹-潜层（生成中期），检验多层互补性。

Result: 与原始生成相比，多层累积干预减少知识违规输出70.97%。实验表明每个新增层能处理先前层无法覆盖的失败类别，实证确认了框架的互补性预测。

Conclusion: 知识注入应被理解为干预层问题，不同层具有互补性，多层组合能更全面地减少知识违规输出。该框架为设计安全、可控的多模态生成系统提供了结构化的设计原则。

Abstract: Multimodal generative models produce fluent outputs but remain unreliable when generation must respect structured, domain-specific, or safety-critical knowledge. Existing methods incorporate knowledge through mechanisms such as prompt augmentation, guidance, latent editing, or fine-tuning, yet they are typically categorized by technique rather than by the component of the generative process they modify. We argue that knowledge infusion in iterative generative models is fundamentally anintervention-layer problem. Since thegenerative process unfolds as a trajectory of internal states, knowledge can act on four structurally distinct components of this process: the input/output boundary, the transition function, the intermediate state, and the model parameters. This maps to four intervention layers: surface, trajectory, latent, and parametric infusion. We instantiate the framework in diffusion models, map representative methods to all four layers, and derive design principles for multi-layer composition. In a controlled safety-alignment experiment using a multimodal knowledge graph with two diffusion backbones, we implement three of the four layers cumulatively, surface (input-side and output-side) and trajectory--latent (mid-generation). We show empirically that each additional layer addresses failure classes that prior layers cannot reach, reducing knowledge-violating outputs by 70.97% compared to vanilla generation and empirically confirming the framework's complementarity prediction.

</details>


### [310] [An Infectious Disease Spread Simulation Based on Large Language Model Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06360)
*Yonchanok Khaokaew,Ruochen Kong,Andreas Zufle,Hao Xue,Taylor Anderson,Chandini Raina MacIntyre,Matthew Scotch,Flora D. Salim,David J Heslop*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出一个空间化、基于智能体的仿真框架，结合大语言模型和大规模人口数据，模拟疫情中个体的自我报告行为。结果显示收入和受教育程度是行为变化的主要驱动因素，地理位置、模型选择和消息框架也有较小但一致的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传染病爆发期间个体决策建模对理解行为动态和制定有效公共卫生干预至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对空间异质性和社会人口特征的综合考虑。

Method: 构建空间化、基于智能体的仿真框架，将LLM生成的决策集成到基于人口普查的合成人群中，以地理位置为核心特征，在旧金山和亚特兰大模拟三种决策场景（独立推理、家庭影响、消息框架）。

Result: 收入和受教育程度是报告率变化的主导因素；地理位置、LLM模型选择和消息框架也有较小但一致的影响。框架能生成兼具社会和地理异质性的合成数据。

Conclusion: 该框架支持空间流行病学建模和偏差感知的行为分析，为理解疫情中行为异质性和设计针对性干预措施提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Modelling individual decision-making during infectious disease outbreaks is crucial for understanding behavioural dynamics and informing effective public health interventions. Prior work has shown that large language models can simulate realistic human behaviour by generating agent decisions based on demographic prompts and situational context. We build on this foundation with a spatially grounded, agent-based simulation framework that integrates LLM-generated decisions about self-reported influenza-like illness into a census-based synthetic population of agents. Location is treated as a central feature: agents are assigned to spatial units within cities, capturing the spatial distributions of different demographic groups using real-world census data and enabling geographically diverse behavioural modelling. We implement and compare three decision scenarios, independent reasoning, household influence, and message framing, and simulate self-reporting outcomes in San Francisco and Atlanta. Results reveal that income and education are the dominant drivers of reporting rate variation, with smaller but consistent effects from geography, LLM model choice, and message framing. Our framework generates synthetic data that captures both social and geographic heterogeneity, supporting spatial epidemiological modelling and bias-aware behavioural analysis.

</details>


### [311] [Rethinking Infrastructure Inspection as Image Difference Classification: A Traffic Sign Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06375)
*Ching Yau Fergus Mok,Lavindra de Silva,Varun Kumar Reja,Ioannis Brilakis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将图像缺陷检测重新定义为图像差异分类（IDC），以减少对标注数据的依赖，并在低资源交通标志检测案例中验证了基于指令的分类器优于编码器方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字孪生技术在道路基础设施检测中受限于标注数据不足，亟需一种降低数据依赖的缺陷检测方法。

Method: 利用连续资产状态监测的关系特性，将基于图像的缺陷检测重新建模为图像差异分类（IDC），并在低资源交通标志检测场景下使用多种分类器进行对比评估。

Result: 基于指令的分类器优于基于编码器的分类器，并且通过与参考图像比较能进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 图像差异分类（IDC）是一种有效的数据约束应对策略，可推动基础设施检测和数字孪生资产状态更新。

Abstract: Digital twins (DTs) allow the digitalization of road infrastructure inspection, though this is hindered by limited annotated data. This work exploits the relational nature of continuous asset condition monitoring to reformulate image-based defect detection as image difference classification (IDC) to reduce data reliance. This was evaluated in a case study on low-resource traffic sign inspection with different IDC classifiers using a newly-curated, high quality dataset. Results indicate that the instruction-based classifier outperforms encoder-based ones and gains from comparison with reference images. This shows that IDC can be an effective task modeling for tackling data constraints in infrastructure inspection and DT asset condition updating.

</details>


### [312] [Humans' ALMANAC: A Human Collaboration Dataset of Action-Level Mental Model Annotations for Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06388)
*Jiaju Chen,Yuxuan Lu,Jiayi Su,Chaoran Chen,Songlin Xiao,Zheng Zhang,Yun Wang,Yunyao Li,Jian Zhao,Tongshuang Wu,Toby Jia-Jun Li,Dakuo Wang,Bingsheng Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ALMANAC数据集，包含2,987个协作动作及其心智模型标注（自我推理、感知的伙伴意图、感知的团队目标），用于评估LLM代理在人类协作中模拟行为和推断心智模型的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM代理主要优化任务完成度，缺乏持续维护和对齐合作中心智模型（自身推理、伙伴意图、共享目标）的能力，且社区缺少带有动作级心智模型标注的真实人类协作数据。

Method: 基于社会科学中的Map Task双人路由任务，构建包含2,987个协作动作的数据集，每个动作配有理论驱动的心智模型标注（自我推理、感知的伙伴意图、感知的团队目标），并基准测试六个LLM预测人类下一轮行为和心智模型的能力。

Result: 基准测试结果展示了ALMANAC在评估模型模拟人类协作行为及推断其背后心智模型方面的实用性。

Conclusion: ALMANAC填补了协作智能体缺乏动作级心智模型标注数据的空白，为提升LLM代理的过程级协作能力提供了评估基准。

Abstract: Recent advances in LLM agents have enabled complex cognitive capabilities, such as multi-step reasoning, planning, and tool use, that increasingly position these agents as human collaborators. Effective collaboration, however, requires collaborators to continuously maintain and align mental models of their own reasoning,partners' intentions, and shared goals during the collaborative process. Today's agents rarely develop such capabilities since they are primarily optimized for task completion, and the community lacks authentic human collaboration data with action-level mental model annotations that could guide agents toward process-level collaborative competence. To bridge this gap, we present ALMANAC, a dataset of Action-Level Mental model ANnotations for Agent Collaboration built from the Map Task, a classic dyadic routing task from social science. ALMANAC contains 2,987 collaboration actions, each paired with theory-informed mental model annotations that record the participants' self-reasoning, perceived partner intent, and perceived team goal. We benchmark six LLMs on predicting humans' next-turn behavior and mental models. Our results demonstrate ALMANAC's utility in evaluating models' ability to simulate human collaborative behaviors and infer their underlying mental models.

</details>


### [313] [Risk Assessment of Autonomous Driving: Integrating Technical Failures, Ethical Dilemmas, and Policy Frameworks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06396)
*Boyi Chen,Shengqin Chu,Zicheng Wang,Brian Baetz,Zhen Gao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 基于NHTSA事故数据、加州DMV脱离报告、MIT道德机器数据集及五地法规对比分析，发现自动驾驶主要技术故障为感知与分类错误，存在不同伦理框架且法规不统一，建议采用适应性协作治理模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶技术有望减少人为事故，但带来了技术、伦理和法规三方面的新风险，亟需系统性评估。

Method: 综合分析了NHTSA事故数据、加州DMV脱离报告、MIT道德机器数据集，并对五个司法管辖区的法规进行了比较研究。

Result: 主要技术故障模式为感知与分类错误，占报告事故比例较大；存在多种伦理决策框架；不同地区法规不一致增加了广泛应用的难度。

Conclusion: 技术、伦理和法规问题密切相关，需协同解决，建议采用将工程标准、伦理讨论和制度监督相结合的适应性协作治理方法。

Abstract: Autonomous driving technology has the potential to reduce the large number of road traffic accidents caused by human error each year, but it also brings new types of risks that need to be evaluated from the aspects of technology, ethics and regulations. Based on public crash data from the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA), disengagement reports from the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV), the MIT Moral Machines dataset, and a comparative regulatory analysis of five jurisdictions, we have found that the main types of technical failure modes are perception and classification errors. These account for a relatively large proportion of the reported accidents, and it can be concluded that there are different ethical frameworks for autonomous vehicle decision-making, and inconsistent regulations in different areas increase the uncertainty of widespread application. Generally speaking, the problems of technology, ethics and regulation are closely related and need to be solved together. Therefore, this paper recommends a more adaptive and cooperative governance approach that combines engineering standards, ethical discussion, and institutional supervision.

</details>


### [314] [Unsupervised Skill Discovery for Agentic Data Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06416)
*Zhisong Qiu,Kangqi Song,Shengwei Tang,Shuofei Qiao,Lei Liang,Huajun Chen,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DataCOPE是一种无监督的验证器引导的技能发现框架，通过从探索轨迹中提取验证信号，迭代协调数据分析智能体、无监督验证器和技能管理器，以自动发现可复用的数据分析技能，在报告式和推理式分析任务上分别提升平均得分9.71%和32.30%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理时技能增强可以轻量地提升数据分析智能体，但有效技能的发现面临两大挑战：可靠的监督信号成本高昂，且不同分析格式的成功标准差异大。核心问题是如何在无标注的探索中自动发现可复用的数据分析技能。

Method: 提出DataCOPE框架，包含三个迭代协调的组件：1) 数据分析智能体生成探索轨迹；2) 无监督验证器从轨迹中提取信号（报告式分析用自适应清单验证器，推理式分析用答案一致性验证器）；3) 技能管理器通过对比学习蒸馏技能。

Result: 在Deep Data Research（报告式）和DABStep（推理式）两个任务上，DataCOPE持续优于基线方法，在四种模型设置下，报告式和推理式任务的平均得分分别提升9.71%和32.30%。

Conclusion: 无监督的验证器引导技能发现框架可以有效提升数据分析智能体的性能，无需人工标注或模型参数更新，且适用于不同形式的分析任务。

Abstract: Inference-time skill augmentation provides a lightweight way to improve data-analytic agents by injecting reusable procedural knowledge without updating model parameters. However, discovering effective skills for data analysis remains challenging, as reliable supervision is expensive and success criteria vary across analytical formats. This raises the key question of how to discover reusable data-analysis skills from unlabeled exploration alone. We propose DataCOPE, an unsupervised verifier-guided skill discovery framework for data-analytic agents. DataCOPE derives verifier signals from the exploration trajectories and uses them to characterize relative quality or aggreement among trajectories. It iteratively coordinates a Data-Analytic Agent for trajectory generation, an Unsupervised Verifier for signal extraction, and a Skill Manager for contrastive skill distillation. For report-style analysis, we instantiate the verifier as an Adaptive Checklist Verifier that derives task-specific criteria, scores reports by verifiable coverage, and iteratively refines the checklist. For reasoning-style analysis, we instantiate it as an Answer Agreement Verifier that groups trajectories by answer agreement and uses self-consistency as an auxiliary signal. We evaluate DataCOPE on report-style analysis from Deep Data Research and reasoning-style analysis from DABStep. Across both settings, DataCOPE consistently improves held-out performance over baselines. Averaged across four model settings, DataCOPE improves the mean score by 9.71% and 32.30% on report-style and reasoning-style tasks respectively.

</details>


### [315] [Agent Memory: Characterization and System Implications of Stateful Long-Horizon Workloads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06448)
*Yasmine Omri,Ziyu Gan,Zachary Broveak,Robin Geens,Zexue He,Alex Pentland,Marian Verhelst,Tsachy Weissman,Thierry Tambe*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文首次对LLM代理记忆系统进行系统性表征，提出四轴分类法，构建阶段感知性能分析框架，对10个代表性系统进行基准测试，并给出10条系统设计建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在长周期任务中需要跨会话持久存储、检索和更新记忆，但现有记忆系统繁多且缺乏系统性行为表征，亟需统一的分类和分析方法。

Method: 提出面向系统的四轴分类法（存储/检索/更新/控制）；构建阶段感知的性能分析工具，将成本归因于构建、检索和生成三个阶段；在两个基准套件上表征10个代表性系统。

Result: 揭示了设计选择如何影响读写路径的成本分布；给出了10条系统建议，涵盖构建调度、能力下限、查询量摊销、新鲜度-延迟权衡、集群规模管理等。

Conclusion: 该工作为代理记忆系统的系统级理解和优化提供了首个系统性框架和实证基础。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks requiring sustained reasoning over extended interaction histories. Realizing this at scale requires agents to persistently store, retrieve, and update their own memory across sessions. A rich ecosystem of agent memory systems has emerged spanning flat retrieval, LLM-mediated extraction, consolidating fact stores, and agentic control flows. Yet, their system-level behavior remains uncharacterized. We present the first systems characterization of agent memory. First, we introduce a system-oriented taxonomy classifying agent memory systems along four axes. Second, we build a phase-aware profiling harness attributing cost to construction, retrieval, and generation. Third, we characterize ten representative systems across two benchmark suites, uncovering how design choices shift cost across the write and read paths. Finally, we derive 10 system recommendations covering construction scheduling, capability floors, amortization via query volume, freshness-latency tradeoffs, and fleet-scale management.

</details>


### [316] [Vortex: Efficient and Programmable Sparse Attention Serving for AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06453)
*Zhuoming Chen,Xinrui Zhong,Qilong Feng,Ranajoy Sadhukhan,Yang Zhou,Michael Qizhe Shieh,Zhihao Jia,Beidi Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Vortex是一个用于高效表达、原型设计和部署稀疏注意力算法的系统，通过Python嵌入式前端语言和页面中心张量抽象，显著加速了LLM推理中的稀疏注意力研究，AI agent可自动生成多样化算法，最高实现3.46倍吞吐量提升，并在MLA-based GLM-4.7-Flash和229B参数MiniMax-M2.7上分别达到4.7倍和1.37倍吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM生成序列不断增长，稀疏注意力变得越来越重要，但大规模部署和评估新的稀疏注意力算法工程负担极重，严重制约了人类研究者和AI agent在稀疏注意力设计上的探索效率。

Method: Vortex结合了Python嵌入的领域专用前端语言和页面中心张量抽象（page-centric tensor abstraction），可表达广泛的稀疏注意力算法；后端与现代LLM服务栈紧密集成，实现了高效的推理执行。

Result: AI agent使用Vortex自动生成和优化多样化算法，最佳算法相比full attention实现3.46倍吞吐量提升且保持精度；在MLA-based GLM-4.7-Flash上达4.7倍吞吐量提升，在229B参数MiniMax-M2.7上（NVIDIA B200 GPU）达1.37倍吞吐量提升。

Conclusion: Vortex显著加速了稀疏注意力算法的设计与迭代，使理论效率增益有效转化为实际吞吐量提升，并将稀疏注意力扩展到了难以实验的新兴架构和超大模型。

Abstract: Sparse attention is becoming increasingly important for serving large language models (LLMs) as generation lengths continue to grow. However, deploying and evaluating new sparse attention algorithms at scale remains highly engineering-intensive, slowing both human researchers and AI agents in exploring the sparse attention design. To address this challenge, we present Vortex, a system that combines a Python-embedded frontend language atop a page-centric tensor abstraction for expressing a broad range of sparse attention algorithms, with an efficient backend tightly integrated into modern LLM serving stacks. Vortex enables rapid prototyping, deployment, and evaluation of sparse attention algorithms, effectively translating their theoretical efficiency gains into real-world throughput improvements. As a result, Vortex substantially accelerates the design and iteration of sparse attention algorithms. First, AI agents use Vortex to automatically generate and refine diverse algorithms, the best reaching up to $3.46\times$ higher throughput than full attention while preserving accuracy. Second, Vortex extends sparse attention to emerging architectures and very large models that are otherwise hard to experiment with, reaching up to $4.7\times$ higher throughput on the MLA-based GLM-4.7-Flash and $1.37\times$ on the 229B-parameter MiniMax-M2.7 on NVIDIA B200 GPUs.

</details>


### [317] [Benchmark Everything Everywhere All at Once](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06462)
*Shiyun Xiong,Dongming Wu,Peiwen Sun,Yuang Ai,Bokang Yang,Wencheng Han,Xiao-Hui Li,Xiangyu Yue*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Benchmark Agent，一种全自动构建评测基准的系统，可自主完成从用户需求分析到数据标注的全流程，生成高质量评测样本，缓解传统基准构建成本高、易饱和的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基准构建劳动密集、难以复用，且发布后容易达到性能饱和，无法有效区分顶尖模型。因此需要一种自动化、可持续、可扩展的基准构建方法。

Method: 提出Benchmark Agent，一个完全自主的智能体系统，编排完整基准构建流水线，包括用户查询分析、子任务设计、数据标注和质量控制。

Result: 系统生成了15个代表性基准，涵盖文本理解、多模态理解和领域特定推理。通过人工评估、LLM评判和一致性检查，证明其能在极少人工参与下生成高质量基准样本。持续评测发现当前模型在某些领域特定推理任务上存在困难。

Conclusion: Benchmark Agent能高效自动化构建高质量评测基准，且快速演进的基准对研究社区有重要贡献价值。

Abstract: Benchmarks are fundamental for evaluating and advancing LLMs and MLLMs by providing standardized and explicit measures of performance. However, their construction is labor-intensive and hard to reuse, raising concerns about sustainability and scalability. Moreover, existing benchmarks often quickly reach performance saturation after their release, resulting in insufficient discrimination among state-of-the-art models. To address these challenges, we introduce Benchmark Agent, a fully autonomous agentic system designed for benchmark building. Our framework orchestrates the complete benchmark construction pipeline, from user query analysis and subtask design to data annotation and quality control. To assess Benchmark Agent, we implement it to produce 15 representative benchmarks, spanning diverse evaluation scenarios, including text understanding, multimodal understanding, and domain-specific reasoning. Extensive experiments, including human evaluation, LLM-as-a-judge assessment, and consistency checks, demonstrate Benchmark Agent can generate high-quality benchmark samples with minimal human involvement. More importantly, through continual evaluation, we observe several insightful findings, including that current models struggle with certain domain-specific reasoning tasks. We believe that rapidly evolving benchmarks can contribute significantly to the research community. The preview and code will be publicly available at the demo page and code repository.

</details>


### [318] [Goedel-Architect: Streamlining Formal Theorem Proving with Blueprint Generation and Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06468)
*Jui-Hui Chung,Ziyang Cai,Zihao Li,Qishuo Yin,Rohit Agarwal,Simon Park,Rodrigo Porto,Narutatsu Ri,Ziran Yang,Shange Tang,Xingyu Dang,Hongzhou Lin,Mengdi Wang,Danqi Chen,Chi Jin,Liam H Fowl,Sanjeev Arora*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了Goedel-Architect，一个基于蓝图生成与优化的智能体框架，用于Lean 4中的形式定理证明。该框架首先生成形式化定义和引理的依赖图（蓝图），然后并行证明每个开放引理节点，失败节点驱动全局蓝图优化。在MiniF2F-test上达到99.2% pass@1，PutnamBench上75.6% pass@1，是目前开源流水线中的最先进水平，且成本降低多达500倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主流形式定理证明方法采用递归引理分解策略，容易在死胡同策略上低效循环。作者希望设计一种更高效、可并行化的框架，通过全局蓝图生成与迭代优化来避免上述问题。

Method: 1) 首先生成一个包含形式化定义、引理及依赖关系的有向无环图（蓝图）；2) 可选的，蓝图可由自然语言证明引导生成；3) 工具增强的Lean证明器并行地证明每个开放引理节点；4) 失败的引理反过来驱动全局蓝图的细化优化，形成闭环迭代。

Result: 使用DeepSeek-V4-Flash (284B-A13B)作为骨干模型：MiniF2F-test 99.2% pass@1，PutnamBench 75.6% pass@1。加入自然语言证明引导后：MiniF2F-test达100%，PutnamBench提升至88.8%（597/672），IMO 2025解决4/6，Putnam 2025解决11/12，USAMO 2026解决3/6。

Conclusion: Goedel-Architect代表了开源形式定理证明流水线的最先进水平，且价格点比同类开源流水线低500倍。蓝图生成+并行证明+失败驱动优化的策略有效解决了递归分解的死胡同问题。

Abstract: We introduce Goedel-Architect, an agentic framework for formal theorem proving in Lean 4 centered on blueprint generation and refinement. A blueprint is a dependency graph of definitions and lemmas that builds up to the main theorem. First, Goedel-Architect generates a blueprint of formally stated definitions and lemmas, along with declared dependencies. This blueprint is optionally guided by a natural language proof. Then, a tool-equipped Lean prover component closes each open lemma node in parallel using relevant dependencies. Failed lemmas in turn drive refinement of the global blueprint. This strategy contrasts with other mainstream approaches which use recursive lemma decomposition, and can inefficiently loop on dead-end strategies. Using the open-weight DeepSeek-V4-Flash (284B-A13B) as the backbone, Goedel-Architect attains 99.2% pass@1 on MiniF2F-test and 75.6% pass@1 on PutnamBench. With an optional natural-language proof seeding the initial blueprint on the harder problems, we additionally close the remaining two MiniF2F-test problems (reaching 100%), lift PutnamBench to 88.8% (597/672), and solve 4/6 on IMO 2025, 11/12 on Putnam 2025, and 3/6 on USAMO 2026. This represents state-of-the-art performance for an open-source pipeline at a price point up to 500x less than comparable open-source pipelines.

</details>


### [319] [MLEvolve: A Self-Evolving Framework for Automated Machine Learning Algorithm Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06473)
*Shangheng Du,Xiangchao Yan,Jinxin Shi,Zongsheng Cao,Shiyang Feng,Zichen Liang,Boyuan Sun,Tianshuo Peng,Yifan Zhou,Xin Li,Jie Zhou,Liang He,Bo Zhang,Lei Bai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MLEvolve，一种基于LLM的自进化多智能体框架，通过Progressive MCGS、Retrospective Memory和分层控制解决长时序ML算法发现中的信息隔离、无记忆搜索和缺乏层次控制问题，在MLE-Bench和数学算法优化任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLE智能体面临三个关键瓶颈：分支间信息隔离导致搜索碎片化、无记忆搜索无法积累经验、缺乏分层控制使得长时序优化不稳定，这些问题阻碍了智能体在科学发现和机器学习工程等长时序任务中的持续自我进化能力。

Method: 提出MLEvolve框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) Progressive MCGS，通过图结构跨分支信息流和熵启发的渐进式调度，实现从广泛探索到集中利用的平滑过渡；(2) Retrospective Memory，结合冷启动领域知识库和动态全局记忆，支持任务特定经验的检索与复用；(3) 解耦式层次控制，将策略规划与代码生成分离，并引入自适应编码模式确保长时序迭代的稳定性。

Result: 在MLE-Bench上，MLEvolve在12小时（标准运行时的一半）预算下，在平均奖牌率和有效提交率等多个维度达到SOTA；在数学算法优化任务上，超越包括AlphaEvolve在内的专业算法发现方法，展现了强跨域泛化能力。

Conclusion: MLEvolve通过图搜索、记忆增强和层次控制的有效结合，显著提升了LLM智能体在机器学习算法发现长时序任务中的持续进化能力，且方法具有跨领域泛化的潜力。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to long-horizon tasks such as scientific discovery and machine learning engineering (MLE), where sustained self-evolution becomes a key capability. However, existing MLE agents suffer from inter-branch information isolation, memoryless search, and lack of hierarchical control, which together hinder long-horizon optimization. We present MLEvolve, an LLM-based self-evolving multi-agent framework for end-to-end machine learning algorithm discovery. By extending tree search to Progressive MCGS, MLEvolve enables cross-branch information flow through graph-based reference edges and gradually shifts the search from broad exploration to focused exploitation with an entropy-inspired progressive schedule. To allow the agent to evolve with accumulated experience, we introduce Retrospective Memory, which combines a cold-start domain knowledge base with a dynamic global memory for task-specific experience retrieval and reuse. For stable long-horizon iteration, we further decouple strategic planning from code generation with adaptive coding modes. Evaluation on MLE-Bench shows that MLEvolve achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple dimensions including average medal rate and valid submission rate under a 12-hour budget (half the standard runtime). Moreover, MLEvolve also outperforms specialized algorithm discovery methods including AlphaEvolve on mathematical algorithm optimization tasks, demonstrating strong cross-domain generalization. Our code is available at https://github.com/InternScience/MLEvolve.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [320] [A Unified Framework for Uniform-Price Resource Allocation Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06151)
*Ioannis Caragiannis,Dimitris Fotakis,Stratis Skoulakis*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的资源分配机制框架，在保持Kelly机制比例分配和统一定价简单性的同时，能实现从Kelly机制到第一价格拍卖的平滑过渡，显著提升效率和收益保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有比例（Kelly）机制虽然简单但效率不足，而改进机制虽能提升社会福利却牺牲了简单性。研究者希望设计一种既保持简单性又能提升效率和收益保障的统一框架。

Method: 提出统一框架，通过调节参数在Kelly机制与第一价格拍卖之间内插，保持比例分配和统一定价的简单性，但调整分配规则和定价方式。

Result: 该机制族在效率上严格优于Kelly机制，能在均衡状态下实现完全效率；同时提供相对于VCG机制的收益保障。

Conclusion: 简单性和效率并非不可兼得，通过统一框架可以在保持比例分配和统一定价的同时，大幅提升效率和收益表现。

Abstract: Mechanisms for allocating a divisible resource among strategic agents have been widely studied. The prominent paradigm is the proportional (Kelly) mechanism, which elicits a scalar bid per agent, allocates the resource proportionally, and charges payments equal to the bids. Follow-up mechanisms improve social welfare, but sacrifice simplicity by introducing complex allocation rules or unintuitive payments.
  We introduce a unified framework for designing simple resource allocation mechanisms with proportional-style allocations and uniform pricing. Our framework yields a family of mechanisms that interpolate between the Kelly mechanism and the first-price auction. These mechanisms strictly improve upon Kelly's efficiency guarantees, even achieving full efficiency in equilibrium, while also providing revenue guarantees relative to the VCG mechanism.

</details>


### [321] [Constant Approximation for Hylland--Zeckhauser Equilibria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06317)
*Yonglei Yan,Zhengyang Liu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个多项式时间算法，在多元效用设置下实现Hylland-Zeckhauser均衡的1/e近似，通过效用分层技术将多元市场简化为双值实例，并利用现有精确算法进行计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在匹配市场中，HZ均衡是重要的公平分配概念，但此前缺乏多元效用设置下的高效近似算法。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的效用分层（utility stratification）技术，将原始多元效用市场转化为结构化的双值实例，从而能够利用Vazirani和Yannakakis的精确算法高效计算近似解。

Result: 实现了1/e近似的HZ均衡，这是多元效用设置下首个具有多项式时间复杂度的近似保证。

Conclusion: 该工作为多元效用市场中的HZ均衡计算建立了首个效率保证，展示了效用分层技术在简化复杂市场结构方面的有效性。

Abstract: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for computing a $1/e$-approximate Hylland--Zeckhauser (HZ) equilibrium. This establishes the \emph{first} efficient approximation guarantee for HZ equilibria in settings with multi-valued utilities. Our main technical contribution is a novel utility stratification technique that reduces the original multi-valued market to a structured bi-valued instance. This reduction allows us to efficiently compute the approximation by leveraging the exact algorithm of Vazirani and Yannakakis.

</details>


### [322] [Simultaneous EF1 and approximate MMS allocations for submodular valuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06451)
*Uriel Feige,Assaf Fine*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在子模估值下，如何同时满足基于份额（ρ-MMS）和基于比较（EF1/EFL）的公平分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平分配研究中，基于份额的公平概念（如MMS）和基于比较的公平概念（如EF）通常无法互相兼容，缺乏同时满足两类公平性的分配方案。

Method: 针对子模估值这一更一般的估值类别，设计分配算法，使得分配结果同时满足ρ-MMS（ρ为常数）与EF1（以及EFL）的公平性保证。

Result: 在子模估值下，成功构造了同时满足常数ρ的ρ-MMS和EF1/EFL的分配方案。

Conclusion: 将此前仅适用于可加估值的双类公平分配结果推广到了更一般的子模估值场景。

Abstract: There are two common classes of fairness notions that are considered when allocating $m$ indivisible items to $n$ agents of equal entitlements. One is that of share-based fairness notions, with the maximin share (MMS) and its relaxations to $ρ$-MMS being prominent representatives of this class. The other is that of comparison-based fairness notions, with envy-freeness (EF) and its relaxations such as EF1 being prominent representatives of this class. In general, no class offers good guarantees for the other class. In this work, we design allocations that simultaneously satisfy notions from both classes, and specifically, are $ρ$-MMS for constant $ρ$ and EF1 (in fact, also EFL). Such results were previously known when agents have additive valuations, and we prove such results for the more general class of submodular valuations.

</details>


### [323] [DNQ: Deep Nash Q-Network for Partially Observable n-Player Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06480)
*Qintong Xie,Edward Koh,Xavier Cadet,Peter Chin*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出DNQ框架，通过求解器在环的均衡监督训练多智能体同时竞价代理，平衡了策略保真度与可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实竞争系统（如拍卖、资源分配）需要在有限信息和重复互动下多智能体同时决策，现有方法难以在保真度和可扩展性间取得平衡。

Method: DNQ交替进行轨迹收集、基于评论家的收益估计、均衡计算和策略模仿。使用共享评论家预测收益矩阵，外部求解器计算均衡策略，通过KL散度最小化训练策略。

Result: 成对变体在评论家损失、策略熵、资源使用和训练成本上优于精确变体，能扩展到更多智能体，而精确方法在联合博弈增大时计算上不可行。

Conclusion: DNQ展示了战略保真度与可扩展性之间的权衡，成对方法适合大规模场景，精确方法适用于小规模高保真需求场景。

Abstract: Many real-world competitive systems require multiple decision-makers to act simultaneously under shared constraints, limited information, and repeated interaction, as in auctions, resource allocation, and security competition. We study multi-turn simultaneous bidding as a controlled testbed for such problems and propose DNQ, a solver-in-the-loop equilibrium supervision framework for training bidding agents. DNQ alternates between trajectory collection, critic-based payoff estimation, equilibrium computation, and policy imitation. At each visited state, a shared critic predicts either pairwise payoff matrices or an exact N-player payoff tensor, an external solver computes equilibrium strategies, and the agents are trained by minimizing the KL divergence between their masked policies and the solver-derived equilibrium targets. We focus on a scalable pairwise formulation that greatly reduces equilibrium-solving cost and training time compared with the exact formulation, while the shared critic amortizes payoff learning across agents and states. Experiments compare the pairwise and exact variants using critic loss, policy entropy, bidding resource usage, and training cost, showing that the pairwise method scales to larger numbers of agents, whereas the exact method becomes computationally impractical as the joint game grows. These results illustrate the trade-off between strategic fidelity and scalability in repeated competitive environments.

</details>


### [324] [Should Demand Models Incorporate Competitor Prices? Oblivious Learning and Algorithmic Collusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05363)
*Yuhang Wu,Assaf Zeevi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在竞争性市场中，卖家定价算法是否应明确建模竞争对手价格。研究发现：忽视竞争对手（ oblivious）虽可能产生短暂的共谋模式，但最终价格会收敛至竞争性结果；而纳入竞争对手信息（ informed）的卖家收益更高，且全市场采用 informed 策略是唯一的纳什均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典学习理论认为忽略竞争对手会导致模型误设和效率损失，但近期算法共谋文献表明战略性忽视（oblivious）可能促进合谋并提高利润。本文旨在厘清这一矛盾，探究在竞争性定价中是否应建模竞争对手价格。

Method: 构建一个多卖家重复定价市场的理论模型，卖家通过迭代最小二乘法估计需求，分为两种类型：informed（纳入竞争对手价格）和 oblivious（忽略竞争对手价格）。通过理论分析比较两类市场的价格动态、收敛性质和卖家收益。

Result: (1) oblivious卖家需比垄断者更激进地探索以补偿动态竞争信息缺失；(2) 全oblivious市场在充分探索时收敛至竞争性结果，探索衰减时出现连续伪均衡；(3) 价格轨迹中存在" excursion"现象，产生短暂共谋模式但随学习消失；(4) 混合市场中informed卖家收益严格高于oblivious；(5) 全informed市场是唯一的纳什均衡。

Conclusion: 共谋模式不具有鲁棒性，无法通过 oblivious 建模持续维持；纳入竞争对手信息并配合充分的价格探索，才是竞争性市场中卖家可靠的策略选择。

Abstract: On a platform with many sellers, should a pricing algorithm explicitly model competitors' prices when learning demand? Classical learning arguments suggest an affirmative answer: ignoring competitors induces model misspecification and inefficiency. In contrast, recent work on algorithmic collusion suggests that strategic obliviousness -- deliberately ignoring competitor prices -- may facilitate collusive outcomes and improve profits. We study this modeling choice in a stylized competitive market with unknown noisy demand, in which multiple sellers repeatedly set prices and estimate demand via iterated least squares, and either incorporate competitors' prices into their demand models (informed) or ignore them (oblivious). We first show that, relative to a monopolist, an oblivious seller in a competitive market must explore more aggressively to compensate for the loss of dynamic competitor information. Building on this insight, we characterize market dynamics when all sellers are oblivious and show that prices converge to the competitive outcome under sufficient exploration, while a continuum of pseudo-equilibria arises when exploration decays. Analyzing the resulting price trajectories, we uncover an excursion phenomenon that gives rise to transient collusive patterns that dissipate as learning progresses. In markets with both oblivious and informed sellers, the informed strictly out-earn the oblivious. Read as a strategy game, the modeling choice has a unique Nash equilibrium: the all-informed market, in which prices converge to the competitive outcome efficiently. Overall, our results indicate that collusive patterns are not robust and are not sustained by oblivious modeling; therefore, incorporating competitor information, together with sufficient price exploration, remains a reliable strategy for sellers in competitive markets.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [325] [DeployBench: Benchmarking LLM Agents for Research Artifact Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05238)
*Yuanli Wang,Yaoyao Qian,Yue Zhang,Hanhan Zhou,Jindan Huang,Tianfu Fu,Qiuyang Mang,Huanzhi Mao,Wenhao Chai,Wendong Fan,Liqiang Jing*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了DeployBench基准，包含51个研究工件部署任务，评估了4种LLM代理，通过率为7.8%-51.0%，主要失败原因（63%）是代理的完成判断问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有环境搭建基准未覆盖研究工件部署的完整范围（多语言工具链、系统级依赖、遗留工件兼容性），需要更全面的评估基准。

Method: 构建了涵盖AI/ML、计算机系统、科学计算三个领域的51个部署任务，每个任务有隐藏验证管线；使用OpenHands框架评估四种SOTA LLM。

Result: 四种LLM的通过率为7.8%-51.0%；154次失败中97次（63%）是代理自我终止（代理的完成检查验证了比任务要求更弱的目标）。

Conclusion: DeployBench揭示了当前代理与自主部署能力之间的差距，为科学研究代理提供了现实的测试平台。

Abstract: LLM agents have made rapid progress on software engineering and ML research tasks, but these advances often assume access to a working runnable environment. For research artifacts released alongside published papers, setting up such an environment from a fresh machine remains a major bottleneck. Existing environment setup benchmarks do not cover the full scope of research artifact deployment, which involves multi-language toolchains, system-level dependencies beyond containers (e.g. GPU/CUDA and kernel configurations), and legacy artifact compatibility. We introduce DeployBench, a multi-domain benchmark of 51 research-artifact deployment tasks spanning AI/ML, computer systems, and scientific computing, covering all these dimensions. Each task is verified by a hidden pipeline that executes the paper's designated experiment and checks its outputs. Evaluating four state-of-the-art LLMs with OpenHands yields pass-rates from 7.8% - 51.0% . Failures are dominated by a completion-judgment problem: 97 of 154 are agent-terminated self-stops, where the agent's pre-finish checks validate a different or weaker target than the paper-specific task requires. DeployBench highlights the gap between current agents and autonomous deployment, and offers a realistic testbed for scientific research agents.

</details>


### [326] [SWE-InfraBench: Evaluating Language Models on Cloud Infrastructure Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05249)
*Natalia Tarasova,Enrique Balp-Straffon,Aleksei Iancheruk,Yevhenii Sielskyi,Nikita Kozodoi,Liam H. Byrne,Jack Butler,Dayuan Jiang,Marcin Czelej,Andrew Ang,Yash Shah,Roi Blanco,Sergei Ivanov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SWE-InfraBench基准测试集，用于评估大语言模型在基础设施即代码（IaC）开发中的能力。与现有针对声明式范式（如Terraform）从零生成代码的基准不同，该基准聚焦企业开发中常见的增量代码编辑场景，使用AWS CDK这一命令式工具。评估结果表明，当前最先进的LLM在该任务上表现有限，最佳模型Sonnet 3.7仅达到34%的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IaC基准多关注声明式范式（如Terraform）的从零生成代码任务，而企业开发中更常见的是基于现有代码库的增量编辑。LLM在命令式IaC工具（如AWS CDK）上的代码修改能力尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 构建SWE-InfraBench数据集，从数十个真实世界的AWS CDK代码库中提取任务。每个任务要求模型根据自然语言指令对现有代码库进行修改，并通过提供的测试用例来判定是否成功。

Result: 当前LLM表现有限：最佳模型Sonnet 3.7仅成功34%，DeepSeek R1成功率仅24%。任务涉及复杂的云资源依赖关系和实现模式推理，远超传统代码生成挑战。

Conclusion: 现有LLM在命令式IaC增量代码编辑任务上能力不足，亟需改进。SWE-InfraBench为未来研究提供了有意义的评估基准。

Abstract: Building infrastructure-as-code (IaC) in cloud computing is a critical task, underpinning the reliability, scalability, and security of modern software systems. Despite the remarkable progress of large language models (LLMs) in software engineering -- demonstrated across many dedicated benchmarks -- their capabilities in developing IaC remain underexplored. Unlike existing IaC benchmarks that predominantly center on declarative paradigms such as Terraform and involve generating entire codebases from scratch, our benchmark reflects the incremental code edits common in enterprise development with imperative tools like the AWS CDK. We present SWE-InfraBench, a diverse evaluation dataset sourced from dozens of real-world IaC codebases that challenge LLMs to perform realistic code modifications in AWS CDK repositories. Each example requires models to implement changes to existing codebases based on natural language instructions, with success determined by passing provided test cases. These tasks demand sophisticated reasoning about cloud resource dependencies and implementation patterns beyond conventional code generation challenges. Our evaluation results reveal significant limitations in current LLMs showing that even state-of-the-art systems struggle with many tasks -- the best model, Sonnet 3.7, succeeds in only 34\% of cases, while specialized reasoning models like DeepSeek R1 achieve just 24% success. The SWE-InfraBench dataset is available at: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/64e59070fd51c0278560b01eb5dc4f3c447d5268cdabe5a350d2969e4413fea5

</details>


### [327] [Towards Persistent Case-Based Memory for Autonomous Data Science: A CBR-Augmented R&D-Agent with a Locally Deployable Small Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05250)
*Felix Stocker*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出CBR增强的R&D-Agent，将结构化案例推理（CBR）层集成到微软R&D-Agent框架中，使用Gemma 4 31B Dense作为本地可部署的小语言模型骨干，通过质量过滤和重用检测机制，在Kaggle竞赛上实现了比基线更优且方差更低的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主数据科学智能体依赖云端大模型且缺乏跨会话持久记忆，本文填补了两个空白：(1) 结构化、质量受控的案例推理（CBR）与可执行代码工件的结合未被充分探索；(2) 小语言模型（SLMs）作为本地可部署智能体骨干的可行性尚未经过验证。

Method: 在微软R&D-Agent框架中集成持久化CBR层，通过单一环境变量切换子类覆盖R&D循环的三个阶段。案例存储为结构化记录，包含可执行代码快照和质量元数据；设计了五门质量过滤器与启发式重用检测机制（结合嵌入相似度、代码指纹重叠和注入来源追踪）。使用Gemma 4 31B Dense作为骨干模型。

Result: 在两个Kaggle竞赛（NOMAD 2018和Spaceship Titanic）上评估，每个设置4个种子和8次改进循环。CBR在Spaceship Titanic上达到0.8147准确率（基线0.8098，d=-1.41），方差显著更低。108次检索事件中，平均嵌入相似度0.882（高语义相关性），平均代码指纹相似度0.305（低结构相似度），表明是概念引导而非直接代码复制。

Conclusion: CBR增强的小语言模型智能体在本地部署场景下展现出了可行性和优势：不仅提升了准确率、降低了方差，而且通过重用检测证实了案例库提供的是概念性知识引导而非机械复制，为构建具有持久记忆的本地化自主数据科学智能体提供了有效路径。

Abstract: Most top-performing autonomous data-science agents rely on frontier cloud models and lack persistent, cross-session memory. This paper addresses two open gaps: (1) the underexplored use of formally structured, quality-controlled Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) case bases coupling symbolic case records with executable code artefacts; and (2) the untested viability of Small Language Models (SLMs) as locally deployable agent backbones. We present CBR-augmented R&D-Agent, integrating a persistent CBR layer into Microsoft's R&D-Agent framework with a custom backend for Gemma 4 31B Dense -- the first published end-to-end evaluation of Gemma 4 as an autonomous data-science agent backbone. The CBR layer overrides three R&D loop phases via a surgical subclass toggled by a single environment variable. Cases are stored as structured records with executable code snapshots and quality metadata; a five-gate quality filter and a heuristic reuse-detection mechanism assess knowledge transfer by combining embedding similarity, code-fingerprint overlap, and injection provenance. Evaluated on two Kaggle competitions (NOMAD 2018, Spaceship Titanic) with four seeds over eight improvement loops each, CBR achieves directionally higher accuracy than the CBR-disabled baseline on Spaceship Titanic (0.8147 vs. 0.8098, d = -1.41) with substantially lower variance. Heuristic reuse detection across 108 retrieval events shows high semantic relevance (mean embedding similarity 0.882) alongside variable structural proximity (mean code-fingerprint similarity 0.305), consistent with conceptual guidance rather than verbatim code copying.

</details>


### [328] [A Taxonomy of Runtime Faults in Model Context Protocol Servers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05339)
*Joshua Owotogbe,Indika Kumara,Willem-Jan van den Heuvel,Damian Andrew Tamburri,Antonio Ken Iannillo,Roberto Natella*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次对MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器中的运行时故障进行了实证分类。研究者通过分析473个活跃MCP服务器仓库中的837个故障线程，利用自下而上的开放式编码方法，构建了包含11个顶级类别、27个子类别（73种叶子故障类型）的分类体系。通过55名开发者调查验证，该分类体系具有广泛的外部有效性，平均每位开发者经历过20种故障子类别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP协议虽被广泛采用以增强LLM与外部工具的交互能力，但其运行时配置参数可被接受却不被强制执行，导致意外默认行为等可靠性问题。目前缺乏对MCP服务器运行时故障特征的实证研究，需要系统化的故障分类来理解问题本质。

Method: 采用实证研究方法：1) 从473个活跃维护的MCP服务器GitHub仓库中手动分析837个运行时故障线程；2) 使用自下而上的开放式编码程序推导分类体系；3) 通过55名MCP服务器开发者调查评估分类体系的外部有效性。

Result: 构建了包含11个顶级类别、27个子类别（73种叶子故障类型）的运行时故障分类体系。覆盖协议交互、工具调用、模式执行、状态管理、模型-提供者集成、安全验证、超时/操作取消等故障领域。开发者调查显示平均每人经历过20种故障子类别，所有类别均被观察到。

Conclusion: 该分类体系反映了MCP系统中广泛观察到的运行时故障，具有较高的外部有效性，可为未来AI软件维护与演进提供参考依据。

Abstract: MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables LLMs (Large Language Models) to interact with external tools and data sources via a standardized protocol. Its rapid adoption in tool-augmented Artificial Intelligence (AI) workflows has introduced new reliability challenges, such as configuration parameters that are accepted but not enforced at runtime, leading to unintended default behavior, whose runtime fault characteristics remain empirically unexamined. We present the first empirical taxonomy of runtime faults in MCP servers. We manually analyzed 837 MCP-specific runtime fault threads from 473 actively maintained MCP server GitHub repositories and derived a taxonomy using a bottom-up open coding procedure. The taxonomy comprises 11 top-level categories and 27 subcategories (73 leaf fault types), covering recurrent failures across protocol interactions, tool invocations, schema enforcement, state management, model-provider integration, security validation, and timeouts or explicit cancellations of in-progress operations. To assess the taxonomy's external validity, we surveyed 55 MCP server developers. Respondents reported experiencing an average of 20 of the 27 fault subcategories, and no category remained unobserved. These results indicate that the taxonomy reflects widely observed runtime failures in MCP-based systems and shall assist AI software maintenance and evolution in the future.

</details>


### [329] [Human oversight of agentic systems in practice: Examining the oversight work, challenges, and heuristics of developers using software agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05391)
*Shipi Dhanorkar,Samir Passi,Mihaela Vorvoreanu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究通过对17位经验丰富的开发者进行访谈，探讨了人类在自主软件代理监督中的新兴工作形式，发现了四种监督工作类型：先验控制、共同规划、实时监控和事后审查，并指出监督不仅是反应式和回顾式的，也包括预防式和主动式的。同时记录了开发者面临的监督挑战及他们采用的应对策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关于代理监督的研究主要是概念性的，缺乏对用户实际如何监督代理的实证理解。本文旨在通过实证研究填补这一理论空白，提供早期经验锚点。

Method: 采用探索性研究方法，对17位经验丰富的开发者进行半结构化访谈，分析其在自主软件代理使用中涌现的监督工作形式、时机、方式、挑战及应对策略。

Result: 发现了四种新兴监督工作形式：先验控制、共同规划、实时监控和事后审查。监督工作不仅是反应式和回顾式的，也包括预防式和主动式的。识别了开发者面临的监督挑战（如难以审查代理生成的代码）及采用的启发式策略（如使用测试结果作为代码正确性的保证）。

Conclusion: 研究为代理监督的理论话语提供了实证基础，提出了高层总结、未来研究方向、对软件代理以人为中心设计的启示、对软件工程实践的启示以及研究的局限性。

Abstract: Autonomous software agents hold promise to increase developer productivity but make mistakes and exhibit novel failure modes, making human oversight central to successful human-agent collaboration. Existing research on agent oversight is largely conceptual; normative frameworks exist, but how users actually oversee agents is less known. In this paper, we bridge this gap by providing early empirical anchors for the theoretical discourse on agent oversight. Drawing on interviews with 17 experienced developers, we conduct an exploratory inquiry examining what forms of emergent oversight work developers perform, when, and how. We also document the oversight challenges developers face and the strategies they have started using to address them. We found at least four forms of emergent oversight work: a priori control, co-planning, real-time monitoring, and post hoc review. We show that oversight work is not only reactive and retrospective, as portrayed in existing research, but also preventative and proactive. We describe situated oversight challenges (e.g., difficulty reviewing agent-generated code) and outline heuristics developers adopt to address such challenges (e.g., using test results as guarantees for code correctness). We conclude with high-level takeaways, future research directions, implications for the human-centered design of software agents and for software engineering practice, and limitations of our research.

</details>


### [330] [REStack: A Large-Scale Dataset of Reverse Engineering Discussions from Stack Exchange](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05493)
*Md Humaun Kabir,Md Rakibul Islam,Farha Kamal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文构建了名为REStack的大规模逆向工程讨论数据集（含12,000+帖子、23个主题），揭示RE讨论以实用和任务导向为主，调试、反编译、系统级分析是热点，而内存、固件、文件格式分析问题回答率低、难度高。数据集可用于实证研究、教育及AI工具开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逆向工程实践者面临诸多挑战，但缺乏对真实场景中RE讨论的挑战、话题和知识空白的系统性实证理解，也没有公开数据集可用于相关研究。

Method: 从Stack Overflow和Reverse Engineering Stack Exchange收集12,000+条RE相关帖子；使用基于遗传算法（GA）优化超参数的LDA主题建模，结合人工标注，识别出23个语义连贯的RE主题，聚合为6个高级类别；补充元数据和基于社区互动信号（未回答率、响应时间）的难度指标。

Result: 识别出23个RE主题，归入6个高层次类别；RE讨论以实用和任务导向为主，聚焦调试、反编译和系统级分析；内存、固件、文件格式分析相关主题表现出高难度和高未回答率。

Conclusion: REStack数据集为RE领域的实证研究、教育研究以及AI/LLM辅助开发工具的开发评估提供了可复用的资源，发布数据集及配套脚本以促进可重复研究。

Abstract: Reverse engineering (RE) is a critical activity in software engineering and cybersecurity, supporting tasks such as malware analysis, vulnerability discovery, legacy system maintenance, and firmware inspection. Despite its importance, there is limited empirical understanding of the challenges, topics, and knowledge gaps faced by RE practitioners in real-world settings, and no publicly available dataset has systematically captured RE discussions from developer Q&A forums.
  In this paper, we present REStack, a large-scale dataset of RE discussions collected from Stack Overflow and the dedicated Reverse Engineering Stack Exchange site. The dataset comprises over 12,000 RE-related posts spanning more than 15 years. Using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) with Genetic Algorithm (GA)-based hyperparameter optimization, followed by manual topic labeling, we identify 23 semantically coherent RE topics grouped into six high-level thematic categories. The dataset is further enriched with metadata and difficulty indicators derived from community interaction signals, such as unanswered rates and response times.
  Our analysis reveals that RE discussions are predominantly practical and task-oriented, with strong emphasis on debugging, decompilation, and system-level analysis, while topics related to memory, firmware, and file format analysis exhibit high difficulty and unresolved rates. Beyond empirical characterization, REStack provides a reusable resource for empirical studies, educational research, and the development and evaluation of AI- and LLM-based developer assistance tools for RE. By releasing the dataset and accompanying scripts, this work aims to facilitate reproducible research and advance data-driven support for RE practice.

</details>


### [331] [STMutants: A Mutation Testing Dataset for Structured Text Programs in Industrial Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05499)
*Md Humaun Kabir,Md Rakibul Islam,Helen H. Lou*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了STMutants，一个面向IEC 61131-3结构化文本（ST）程序的首个公开突变测试基准数据集，包含110个突变体，覆盖7类突变算子，并验证了三类大语言模型在该数据集上的突变检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ST语言广泛应用于可编程逻辑控制器（PLC）等实时、安全关键的工业环境，软件故障可能导致设备损坏、生产损失或系统不安全行为。然而，目前缺乏公开可用的突变测试基准来支持ST程序的可重复研究。

Method: 采用四阶段方法构建数据集：故障类型分析与算子选择、语法转换、可编译性验证、人工等价筛选（评分者间一致性kappa=0.87）。数据集包含11个ST程序的110个一阶突变体，经筛选保留108个，覆盖值、关系、算术、逻辑、否定、操作插入/删除、初始化7类突变算子。

Result: 三个大语言模型在108个突变体上的突变检测准确率分别为86.1%、94.4%和86.1%，统计分析表明模型间存在显著性能差异。

Conclusion: STMutants是首个公开的ST程序突变测试基准，支持自动化测试生成、突变分析、故障定位及AI辅助工业软件质量保证等领域的可重复研究。

Abstract: Mutation testing is widely used to evaluate test-suite effectiveness, yet IEC 61131-3 Structured Text (ST) programs still lack a publicly available benchmark that supports reproducible mutation-based research. This gap is especially important because ST is extensively used in Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs) that operate in real-time, safety-critical industrial environments, where software faults may cause equipment damage, production loss, or unsafe system behavior. To address this need, we present STMutants, a curated mutation testing dataset for industrial automation software. STMutants contains 110 generated first-order mutants derived from 11 ST programs collected from the OSCAT basic library and industrially relevant sources, of which 108 are retained after observability and equivalence screening. The dataset covers seven mutation operator categories adapted from classical taxonomies for the PLC domain, including value, relational, arithmetic, logical, negation, operation insertion/omission, and initialization faults. Each mutant is constructed through a four-phase methodology: fault-type profiling and operator selection, syntactic transformation, compilability verification, and manual equivalence screening with strong inter-rater agreement (kappa = 0.87). To demonstrate the usefulness of the dataset, we evaluate three large language models (LLMs) in a two-phase setting: test-suite generation followed by mutation kill/survive prediction. Across 108 retained mutants, the models achieve mutation detection accuracies of 86.1%, 94.4%, and 86.1%, respectively, with statistical analysis confirming significant performance differences. By providing the first publicly available mutation benchmark for ST programs, STMutants enables reproducible research on automated test generation, mutation analysis, fault localization, and AI-assisted quality assurance for PLC software.

</details>


### [332] [ADK Arena: Evaluating Agent Development Kits via LLM-as-a-Developer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05548)
*Jintao Huang,Xiaomin Li,Gaurav Mittal,Yu Hu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Developer方法，通过固定LLM编码代理、仅变化Agent框架来评估51个Python ADK框架在4个基准上的表现。发现：生成成功率57%，成本差异达5.6倍；无单一框架占优（最佳解决80%任务，中位数仅32%）；文档、源码和参数知识可相互替代，非硬瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Agent开发工具包（ADK）快速增长，但框架选择如何影响代理性能缺乏实证理解。现有评估难以排除开发者能力差异的干扰，需要一种可控的、可量化的方法来比较不同框架的有效性。

Method: 提出LLM-as-a-Developer方法：用固定LLM编码代理替代人类开发者，从文档学习API、编写代理代码，并通过验证-反馈循环迭代修复直至测试通过。实现ADK Arena自动化流水线，包含Docker隔离、三级验证管道和4个基准适配器，评估51个Python ADK框架在204个代理-基准组合上的表现。

Result: (1) 生成成功率57%，成本差异5.6倍（0.6-3.4美元），但成本不预测成功率；(2) 无框架占优：最佳框架解决80%任务，可超越通用前沿编码代理且成本更低，但中位数仅32%；(3) 信息源消融实验显示，框架实际使用率在28-40%窄带内，文档、源码和参数知识高度可替代。

Conclusion: 框架选择对代理性能有显著影响但缺乏单一最优解；API可用性（通过生成成本量化）不等于最终性能；框架文档、源码和参数知识具有高度替代性，说明当前框架瓶颈不在信息获取而在于其他因素。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Agent Development Kits (ADKs), SDK-level frameworks for building LLM-powered autonomous agents, has outpaced any empirical understanding of how framework choice affects agent performance. We propose \textbf{LLM-as-a-Developer}, a methodology that replaces human developers with an LLM coding agent that learns each framework's API from documentation, writes agent code, and iteratively repairs it through a validate-and-feedback loop until tests pass. By holding the developer constant and varying only the framework, generation effort becomes a quantitative proxy for API usability and the resulting agents provide a controlled measure of framework effectiveness. We implement this in \textbf{ADK Arena}, a fully automated pipeline with per-framework Docker isolation, a three-level validation pipeline, and benchmark adapters for SWE-bench, $τ^2$-bench, Terminal-Bench, and MCP-Atlas. Evaluating all 51 popular Python ADK frameworks (204 agent--benchmark pairs), we find that: (1)~generation succeeds for 57\% of runs, and its cost varies 5.6$\times$ across frameworks (\$0.6 to \$3.4 per agent), a quantitative proxy for API complexity, though cost alone does not predict success; (2)~no single framework dominates: the best single-benchmark ADK agents resolve up to 80\% of tasks and can even \emph{beat} general-purpose frontier coding agents at a fraction of the cost, yet the median framework resolves only 32\%; (3)~across information-source ablations, genuine framework usage stays within a narrow 28--40\% band (highest with raw source access and still 33\% with no reference material at all), indicating that documentation, source code, and parametric knowledge are largely substitutable rather than any one being a hard bottleneck.

</details>


### [333] [SmellBench: Towards Fine-Grained Evaluation of Code Agents on Refactoring Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05574)
*Fake Lin,Binbin Hu,Xi Zhu,Ziwei Zhao,Zhi Zheng,Ziqi Liu,Zhiqiang Zhang,Jun Zhou,Tong Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SmellBench，一个通过主动注入代码坏味来评估代码智能体重构能力的可扩展基准。实验表明，当前最佳组合（Qwen Code + Claude Sonnet 4.5）仅获得50.34的坏味消除分数，主要原因是智能体过于关注局部坏味而缺乏跨文件理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要评估代码智能体的功能正确性，忽略了长期可维护性这一关键维度。代码智能体常产生臃肿、混乱的代码，但缺乏系统评估其重构能力的基准。

Method: SmellBench通过主动向真实仓库的干净代码中注入7种常见代码坏味，生成294个受控、高质量、多样化的重构案例，涵盖3个难度等级和2种指令设置。评估从功能正确性、定位能力和重构质量三个维度进行。

Result: 最佳组合（Qwen Code + Claude Sonnet 4.5）仅获得50.34分的坏味消除分数。核心瓶颈在于智能体过于关注局部坏味，缺乏跨文件理解，导致无法全面消除坏味。

Conclusion: 当前代码智能体在代码重构维护方面仍有显著不足，尤其是跨文件理解能力亟待提升，为未来研究指明了方向。

Abstract: Code Agents have achieved remarkable advances in recent years, exhibiting strong capabilities across a wide range of software engineering tasks. However, their misuse often produces bloated and disorganized code that impairing readability, extensibility, and robustness. Despite this risk, existing benchmarks largely evaluate functional correctness rather than long-term maintainability of code agents. In this paper, we propose SmellBench, an extensible code refactoring benchmark that proactively injects code smells into clean code snippets from real-world repositories. This design enables the generation of controlled, high-quality, and diverse refactoring cases with human-written ground truth. Specifically, it contains 294 cases spanning 7 popular smell types, 3 difficulty levels, 2 instruction settings across 7 real-world repositories.
