We further design 3 evaluation aspects covering functional correctness, localization ability, and refactoring quality assessment. Experiments with 2 popular agents and 6 large langauge models (LLMs) show that the best combination - Qwen Code + Claude Sonnet 4.5 - achieved only a 50.34 score of smell elimination. Further analysis reveals that this gap arises from a focus on local code smells and a lack of cross-file understanding, which hinders comprehensive smell elimination.

</details>


### [334] [The End of Software Engineering: How AI Agents Are Fundamentally Restructuring the Software Paradigm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05608)
*Zhenfeng Cao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文论证了AI代理（LLM驱动的动态代码生成系统）不是软件工程的渐进改进，而是根本性范式重构，提出了“代理即服务”（AaaS）概念和“代理工程”这一新兴学科，并通过基准证据展示了其潜力与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半个多世纪以来，软件工程一直基于“人类分解问题→编码决策逻辑→手动适应需求变化”的前提。作者认为AI代理的出现（LLM作为推理引擎，代码作为临时工具）构成了根本性变革，需要从第一性原理重新审视软件范式。

Method: 采用第一性原理分析复杂度缩放，形式化区分传统软件（代码即决策载体）与代理系统（代码即LLM推理循环的临时工具）；通过历史演进分析（许可软件→SaaS→AaaS）展示复杂度转移；引入“代理工程”概念；引用SWE-bench Verified、EvoClaw、LangChain等多主体协调研究作为实证。

Result: 通过基准证据展示了代理范式的变革潜力（如自主代码生成与调试能力）和当前局限（多主体协调、可靠性等挑战）；提出了向“自演化代理生态系统”发展的四阶段路线图。

Conclusion: AI代理标志着从“静态代码即决策载体”到“动态推理即核心，代码即工具”的范式转变，催生“代理工程”新学科；给出了从业者应对这一转型的具体建议，并展望了自演化代理生态系统的演进路径。

Abstract: For over half a century, software engineering has operated on a foundational premise: human engineers decompose problems, encode decision logic into static code, and manually adapt that code as requirements evolve. This paper argues that the emergence of AI agents -- systems where large language models serve as the primary reasoning engine, dynamically generating and discarding code as an instrumental resource -- constitutes not an incremental improvement but a fundamental restructuring of the software paradigm. Drawing on first-principles analysis of complexity scaling, we formalize the distinction between traditional software (where code is the carrier of decision logic) and agentic systems (where code is ephemeral tooling for an LLM-driven reasoning loop). We trace the historical arc from licensed software to SaaS to what we term Agent-as-a-Service (AaaS), showing that each shift transferred additional complexity away from end-users. We introduce the concept of Agentic Engineering as an emergent discipline -- distinct from software engineering in its core object of study, control model, and human role. Through analysis of recent benchmark evidence including SWE-bench Verified, EvoClaw, and LangChain's multi-agent coordination studies, we demonstrate both the transformative potential of the agentic paradigm and its current limitations. We conclude with a four-stage roadmap toward self-evolving agent ecosystems and concrete recommendations for practitioners navigating this transition.

</details>


### [335] [Enhancing Software Engineering Through Closed-Loop Memory Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05646)
*Xuehang Guo,Zora Zhiruo Wang,Qingyun Wang,Graham Neubig,Xingyao Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出MemOp，一个面向软件工程智能体的闭环记忆增强框架，通过将记忆效用建立在已验证的下游影响上，实现任务无关的评估与优化，在单轮和跨轮记忆增强中均提升智能体表现（成功率↑5.25%，效率↑4.63%，计算成本↓≥9.79%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的软件工程智能体存在两个关键问题：1）本质上是“片段式”的，无法跨任务保留、提炼和重用经验，每次都要从头构建上下文并重复犯错；2）即使有记忆机制，也缺乏原则性的、任务无关的“记忆效用”度量，导致难以严谨评估或跨智能体/场景泛化。

Method: 提出MemOp闭环框架，核心思想是将记忆效用锚定在“已验证的下游影响”（validated downstream impact）上。记忆效用同时作为：1）任务无关的评估基准；2）无需人工标注的优化信号。框架支持单轮（single-episode）和跨轮（cross-episode）两种记忆增强模式。

Result: 实验表明MemOp在多个设置下一致提升SE智能体性能：成功率绝对提升最高↑5.25%，解决效率提升↑4.63%，同时计算成本显著降低≥9.79%。

Conclusion: MemOp通过将记忆效用与下游影响挂钩，为SE智能体的记忆增强提供了首个任务无关的评估与优化框架，有效缓解了片段式智能体的局限性，兼具通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled powerful software engineering (SE) agents capable of navigating complex codebases and resolving real-world issues. However, these agents remain fundamentally episodic: they fail to retain, refine, and reuse experiences across tasks, repeatedly reconstructing context from scratch and reproducing similar mistakes. Even with memory support, they offer no remedy for the absence of a principled, task-agnostic \textit{memory utility}, making them difficult to evaluate rigorously or generalize across agents and settings. To tackle these limitations, we introduce \ours, a closed-loop framework for memory augmentation in SE agents. \ours grounds memory utility in \textit{validated downstream impact}, establishing utility as both a task-agnostic \textbf{evaluation benchmark} and an annotation-free \textbf{optimization signal}. Through complementary evaluation on \textit{single-episode} and \textit{cross-episode} memory augmentation, results demonstrate that \ours consistently improves SE agents across settings, achieving absolute gains of up to $\uparrow5.25\%$ in success rate and $\uparrow4.63\%$ in resolve efficiency, while substantially reducing computational cost by $\geq9.79\%$. Our project page: \href{https://xhguo7.github.io/MemOp/}{https://xhguo7.github.io/MemOp/}.

</details>


### [336] [When Surface Form Changes Moderation Decisions: A Paired Study of Code-Mixed Workflow Instability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05654)
*Suraj Babu Thimma Krishnaram*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文发现，在泰米尔语-英语代码混合输入下，仇恨内容审核系统会产生显著的动作不稳定性，审查率和误标率大幅上升，且简单的延迟规则只能以增加审查负担为代价来减少错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仇恨审核评估多基于干净的英文输入，但实际部署系统需要处理代码混合输入（如泰米尔语-英语混合）。作者旨在揭示这种语言混合输入对审核工作流的影响。

Method: 采用配对评估设置，将同一内容分别用纯英语和泰米尔语-英语代码混合表达，在纯英语开发数据上调优阈值，然后比较两种输入下的决策稳定性、审查率、误标率等指标。

Result: 代码混合输入下决策翻转率达0.265，审查率从0.138升至0.297，非仇恨内容误标率从0.069升至0.104。泰米尔语输入退化更严重。简单延迟规则虽减少自动错误，但增加了审查负担。

Conclusion: 工作流级别的评估能揭示标准分类评估无法捕捉的审核失败模式，说明现有审核系统在语言多样性方面存在覆盖率不足的问题。

Abstract: Hate moderation is often evaluated as classification on clean English inputs, but deployed systems must route content to actions such as ALLOW, FLAG, or REVIEW. We study how this workflow changes under code-mixed inputs using a paired evaluation setting where the same underlying content is expressed as clean English and Tamil-English code-mix. Under thresholds tuned on clean English development data, code-mixed inputs produce substantial action instability, with a paired clean- to-code-mix decision flip rate of 0.265. The main workflow effects are increased review burden and increased false-flagging of non-hateful content: review rate rises from 0.138 to 0.297 and non-hate false-flag rate rises from 0.069 to 0.104. Tamil-only inputs show stronger degradation overall, suggesting a broader language-coverage limitation rather than the same code-mixed instability pattern. A simple disagreement-based deferral rule reduces automatic errors on stressed inputs, but only by increasing review load. These results show that workflow-level evaluation reveals moderation failures that standard classification summaries can miss.

</details>


### [337] [Microskill Architecture: A Modular Skill-Driven Framework for AI-Native Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05720)
*Mohammad Zare,Omid Abdolrahmani*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出MicroSkill Architecture，一种受微服务启发的模块化知识封装范式。通过将代码库拆分为原子化的“技能胶囊”（skill capsules），并利用动态路由器仅选择语义相关的胶囊送入LLM上下文，从而大幅降低token消耗（超90%），提升编译成功率（近翻倍），消除架构违规，并支持自主演化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有做法将完整项目文档和代码直接注入LLM上下文，导致三个关键问题：(1) 模型丢失中间序列信息（上下文窗口限制）；(2)  token成本失控；(3) 架构漂移（代码更新后上下文未同步）。亟需一种结构化知识管理方案来替代“全量注入”。

Method: 将上下文分配建模为在token预算约束下最大化语义相关性的优化问题。具体设计：(1) 将知识拆分为原子化的skill capsules（每胶囊聚焦单一领域功能）；(2) 动态路由器基于任务语义选择最相关的胶囊；(3) 自学习机制支持胶囊的自主提取与注册。

Result: 在包含15个复杂功能的企业内容管理系统上：(1) token消耗降低超90%；(2) 首次编译成功率从基准方法提升近一倍；(3) 完全消除架构违规；(4) 通过自学习机制自主提取并注册7个新skill capsules。

Conclusion: MicroSkill Architecture为AI原生开发系统提供了可扩展的基础：在效率、可靠性和演化能力三个维度均有显著提升，使AI编码代理能够在更大的代码库和更复杂的任务中保持高性能。

Abstract: Large language models and AI coding agents have reshaped software development, but the path to fully AI-native systems faces structural challenges. Chief among them is managing context windows without losing accuracy or efficiency. When developers inject full project documentation and code into a model's memory, the model loses mid-sequence information, token costs spiral, and architecture drifts. This paper presents MicroSkill Architecture: a modular design paradigm inspired by microservices, applied to knowledge encapsulation instead of service decomposition. Instead of feeding an agent the entire codebase, the architecture partitions knowledge into atomic, sharply scoped skill capsules, and a dynamic router selects only semantically relevant capsules for the task. We formally model context allocation as constrained optimization over semantic relevance subject to a token budget. An empirical case study an enterprise content management system with fifteen complex features shows that MicroSkill cuts token consumption by over 90%, nearly doubles first-try compilation success rates, eliminates architectural violations entirely, and enables autonomous extraction and registration of seven new skill capsules via a self-learning mechanism. These findings suggest MicroSkill Architecture offers a scalable foundation for building AI-native development systems that are more efficient, more reliable, and capable of evolving over time.

</details>


### [338] [Human Oversight and Overload: Two Hidden and Costly Burdens of AI-Assisted Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05770)
*Vahid Garousi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示了AI辅助软件工程中两个常被忽视的负担：人工持续监督审核AI生成内容的需求，以及AI大量建议带来的认知超载问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI正在改变软件工程师的工作方式，但伴随着隐藏的成本和负担，作者希望揭示这些被忽视的挑战，引发业界对如何在日常AI辅助开发中应对这些问题的讨论。

Method: 通过融合来自从业者的近期观点和证据，定性分析并描述两个核心负担：人工监督需求和认知超载。

Result: 识别出两个关键负担：(1) 工程师必须持续审查、验证并返工AI生成的内容，监督不可或免；(2) AI工具涌入的大量建议、提示和解决方案导致开发人员心理负担加重。

Conclusion: 呼吁业界正视AI辅助软件开发中人工监督和认知超载这两个隐藏挑战，并开启关于团队如何应对这些问题的对话。

Abstract: AI is changing how software engineers work, but it often comes with hidden burdens and costs. In this paper, we characterize two such often-overlooked burdens: (1) the constant need for human oversight and inspection of AI-generated artifacts; and (2) the growing cognitive overload on software engineers from receiving large amounts of suggestions from AI tools. The need for human oversight is not optional-engineers must review, validate, and sometimes rework what AI produces. At the same time, the flood of AI suggestions, prompts, and possible solutions can leave developers mentally stretched. By blending evidence from recent opinions from practitioners, we highlight these often-overlooked challenges and open a conversation about how teams can handle them in day-to-day AI-assisted software engineering.

</details>


### [339] [Asuka-Bench: Benchmarking Code Agents on Underspecified User Intent and Multi-Round Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05920)
*Xin Wang,Liangtai Sun,Yaoming Zhu,Shuang Zhou,Jiaxing Liu,Fengjiao Chen,Lin Qiu,Xuezhi Cao,Xunliang Cai,Licheng Zhang,Zhendong Mao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Asuka-Bench是一个面向多轮代码生成与反馈修复的Web开发基准测试，包含50个Web任务、784个评估标准和2402个预期结果，通过代码智能体、UI智能体和用户LLM的闭环流程评估模型能力，结果显示最强模型三轮后仅完成52%项目，远未饱和。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码生成基准测试仅评估从完整提示到一次性输出的单次映射，而真实Web开发中需求往往是逐步明确的，用户需要看到中间结果后迭代反馈。为此提出Asuka-Bench，模拟多轮细化的真实开发场景。

Method: 构建闭环评估流程：代码智能体生成Web项目，UI智能体在部署站点执行测试用例，用户LLM将评估结果转化为自然语言反馈进行下一轮迭代。包含50个Web任务、784条评估标准和2402个预期结果，对8个LLM在2种智能体框架下进行基准测试。

Result: 加权任务通过率在不同模型间相差38个百分点；模型在根据反馈修复能力上表现出显著差异；最强模型在三轮迭代后仅完成52%的项目，表明该基准远未饱和。

Conclusion: Asuka-Bench成功区分了不同模型在多轮Web开发场景中的能力，揭示了现有模型在迭代修复任务上的局限性，为未来代码生成研究提供了更具现实意义的评估基准。

Abstract: Existing code-generation benchmarks score a single mapping from a complete prompt to a one-shot output. However, real web development is different. Users seldom write a full spec at the start; many requirements only become clear once they look at an intermediate result and react to it. We present Asuka-Bench, a benchmark that pairs underspecified user intent with multi-round refinement, grounded in browser-rendered behavior. Each task is resolved through a closed loop: a Code Agent generates a web project, a UI Agent executes test cases on the deployed site, and a User LLM turns evaluation outcomes into natural-language feedback for the next round. The benchmark comprises 50 web tasks with 784 evaluation criteria and 2402 expected outcomes. We benchmark 8 LLMs across 2 agent frameworks. The results separate models clearly: weighted Task Pass Rate varies by 38 percentage points and models also differ substantially in their ability to repair from feedback. Asuka-Bench is also far from saturated: even the strongest model completes only 52% of projects after three rounds.

</details>


### [340] [Metamorphic Testing with the Rashomon Set: Explanation Faithfulness in Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06056)
*Helge Spieker,Jørn Eirik Betten,Arnaud Gotlieb*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出基于蜕变测试的框架，无需真实标签即可评估特征归因解释的可信度，通过五种蜕变关系检验模型行为与解释之间的一致性，帮助选择既准确又可信任的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习中的Rashomon效应导致多个性能相近的模型产生截然不同的特征解释，这让用户难以判断哪些解释值得信赖。现有评估方法往往依赖真实标签，缺乏无监督场景下的可靠性验证手段。

Method: 基于蜕变测试框架，定义了五种蜕变关系来形式化模型行为与特征归因之间应满足的预期一致性属性，从而在无真实标签条件下检验解释可靠性。在表格回归数据集上使用SHAP和LIME进行实验验证。

Result: 该框架能够有效区分不同解释方法的忠实度，在无真实标签情况下识别出不可靠的特征归因解释，为模型选择提供依据。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了一种实用的、模型无关的工具，用于选择具备准确预测能力且解释可信的模型，有助于缓解Rashomon效应带来的信任危机。

Abstract: Multiple machine learning models can achieve near-equivalent predictive performance on the same task, yet provide divergent feature-based explanations. This is called the Rashomon effect of (explainable) machine learning, and it raises the question of which explanations, if any, are trustworthy. We propose a framework based on metamorphic testing that assesses explanation faithfulness without requiring ground-truth labels by exploring attributed feature importance from post-hoc explanation methods. Five metamorphic relations formalize expected consistency properties between model behavior and feature attributions. We apply this general framework to two tabular regression datasets and two post-hoc explainers (SHAP and LIME) to demonstrate the approach. The framework offers a practical, model-agnostic tool for selecting accurate models with reliable and trustworthy explanations.

</details>


### [341] [TLA-Prover: Verifiable TLA+ Specification Synthesis via Preference-Optimized Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06133)
*Eric Spencer,Arslan Bisharat,Brian Ortiz,Khushboo Bhadauria,TaiNing Wang,George K. Thiruvathukal,Konstantin Laufer,Mohammed Abuhamad*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出TLA-Prover，一个200亿参数的TLA+规范合成模型。通过SFT+基于修复的GRPO训练，在30个问题的测试集上达到30%的Gold/Diamond通过率，是未调优基线(8.6%)的3.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型生成的TLA+规范经常无法通过TLC模型检查器的语义检查（最佳基线语义通过率仅8.6%），需要专门针对TLA+规范合成进行优化的模型。

Method: 1) 使用经过验证的示例进行监督微调(SFT)；2) 基于修复的组相对策略优化(GRPO)，模型学习修复自己被拒绝的规范；3) 作为消融实验，训练直接偏好优化(DPO)变体；4) TLC直接提供奖励信号（无奖励模型）；5) 四等级评估体系：Bronze(语法通过)、Silver(无警告)、Gold(通过TLC)、Diamond(修改正确性属性后TLC检测到违规)。

Result: TLA-Prover在30个问题的测试集上，Gold和Diamond等级均达到30%(9/30)的pass@1，约是未调优基线(8.6%)的3.5倍。DPO变体在Diamond等级达到20%。所有检查点中Gold和Diamond结果一致，避免了平凡属性失败模式。

Conclusion: TLA-Prover显著提升了LLM生成TLA+规范的成功率，其关键创新在于GRPO训练让模型自我修复被拒绝的规范，以及Diamond评估标准防止生成平凡的正确性属性。

Abstract: TLA+ is a formal specification language for verifying distributed systems and safety-critical protocols. Large language models (LLMs) frequently produce TLA+ specifications that fail the TLC model checker for semantic reasons. Across 25 LLMs, the best public baseline is 26.6% syntactic parse and 8.6% semantic model-check. We present TLA-Prover, a 20-billion-parameter model for TLA+ specification synthesis. Training combines supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on verified examples with repair-based group-relative policy optimization (GRPO). In the GRPO stage, the model learns to fix its own rejected specifications. We also train a direct preference optimization (DPO) variant from the same SFT checkpoint as an ablation. TLC provides the reward signal directly, with no learned reward model. Four tiers grade each output: Bronze (parses), Silver (no warnings), Gold (passes TLC), and Diamond. To reach Diamond, the model's correctness property is automatically altered in a small way; TLC must then detect a violation. If TLC still passes, the property was always-true and contributes nothing; the output fails Diamond. TLA-Prover reaches 9/30 (i.e. pass@1 = 30%) at both Gold and Diamond on a held-out 30-problem benchmark. This is roughly 3.5x the 8.6% untuned baseline. The DPO variant reaches 20% at Diamond. Gold and Diamond coincide at every checkpoint; this prevents the trivial-property failure mode.

</details>


### [342] [Towards the Readability of LLM-Generated Codes through Multitask Representation Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06214)
*Huifan Gao,Liuhua He,Yinghui Pan,Shenbao Yu,Yifeng Zeng,Shengchao Qin,Weidi Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出多任务表示工程（RepE）框架，在提升大模型生成代码可读性的同时平衡正确性，理论分析了两者间的权衡并通过实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注提升大模型生成代码的正确性，而可读性这一重要指标未得到充分关注。由于可读性具有主观性，通过定向控制提升可读性具有挑战性。

Method: 采用表示工程（RepE）作为定向控制方法（低数据依赖、低计算成本），并扩展提出多任务RepE框架，理论分析多任务引导方法对代码可读性与正确性权衡的影响。

Result: 通过全面实验支持了所提方法的有效性，相关实现已开源。

Conclusion: 多任务RepE框架能有效在提升代码可读性的同时平衡正确性，为代码质量优化提供了新路径。

Abstract: Correctness and readability are key measures of code quality, respectively ensuring functional fidelity and ease of comprehension. While most existing research focuses on improving the correctness of large language models~(LLMs) generated codes, readability remains under-addressed. Enhancing readability through targeted control is challenging due to its subjective nature. In this article, we employ representation engineering~(RepE) as the targeted control method given its characteristics of low data dependency and low computational cost. Prior work on RepE has primarily focused on the targeted control for a single task, but improving the code readability requires the control across multiple tasks. Accordingly we proposes the multitask RepE framework and theoretically discuss the impact of the multitask steering method on the tradeoff between the code readability and correctness. We further provide comprehensive experiments in support. All the relevant implementations are open-source and available upon request.

</details>


### [343] [Domain Diversity, Motivation, Inclusion, and Feedback in Software Modelling Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06275)
*Isabella Graßl,Christopher Lazik,Shalini Chakraborty,Grischa Liebel,Miguel Goulão*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 软件建模教育中，问题领域和教学方式影响学生动机、参与度、包容性和反馈。90名学生和22名教师的调查发现：教师假设与学生偏好存在脱节（学生更喜欢社会相关领域和选择权，而教师高估了学习相关领域的吸引力），小设计选择可能造成排斥，学生认为可见的反馈才有意义。建议采用以学生为中心的领域选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注建模工具、符号和评估，但忽略了问题领域的选择及其多样性、相关性、文化视角对学生学习体验的影响。

Method: 对90名学生和22名教育者进行平行问卷调查。

Result: 1) 学生对与社会相关的领域动机最强，更喜欢有选择权；2) 教育者高估学生对学习相关领域的兴趣；3) 细微的设计选择可能排斥学生；4) 学生认为只有被可见地采纳的反馈才有意义。

Conclusion: 包容性的领域选择是学生动机的核心，建议采用以学生为中心的领域选择方法。

Abstract: Student engagement is critical for effective learning in software modelling, yet fostering motivation and inclusivity remains a challenge. While existing research has focused on modelling tools, notations, and assessment, little attention has been given to how the choice of problem domains and the diversity, relatability, and cultural perspectives they bring shape students' learning experiences. This study explores how problem domains and teaching methods influence motivation, engagement, inclusiveness, and feedback in modelling education. To investigate these dimensions, we conducted parallel surveys with 90 students and 22 educators. Our findings reveal disconnects between educator assumptions and student preferences: Students show greatest motivation for socially relevant domains and prefer choice in selection, while educators overestimate interest in study-related domains. The study identifies how minor design choices can exclude students. Students perceive feedback as meaningful when visibly acted upon. These findings suggest inclusive domain selection is central to student motivation; thus, we recommend student-centred domain selection.

</details>


### [344] [More than a Judge: An Empirical Study of Agent-Human Interaction in Crowdsourced Testing Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06301)
*Yue Wang,Yuan Zhao,Shengcheng Yu,Zhenyu Chen,Qing Gu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过受控人类实验证明，基于多智能体评估框架生成的反馈不仅能帮助众包测试者改进当前报告质量，还能提升后续任务表现，并在不同应用间实现部分迁移，表明评估智能体可作为工作流中嵌入的反馈提供者。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前工作开发了基于LLM-as-a-Judge的多智能体评估框架，能有效对齐人类共识并减少评估工作量，但自动化评判本身并不能证明智能体输出嵌入工作流后能否改善人类工作表现，本文旨在填补这一缺失环节。

Method: 设计四阶段受控人类实验，涉及20名测试者、3个真实应用，通过对比有无智能体生成反馈的条件下，测试者在报告修订、后续任务首次提交表现以及跨应用迁移能力上的差异，并辅以17名参与者的后任务问卷。

Result: 智能体生成的反馈支持了修订报告的即时改进、新任务首次提交质量的提升，以及部分但有意义的跨应用技能迁移。问卷表明反馈通常可理解、被用于修订并延续到后续任务，但在具体性和执行层面仍存在摩擦。

Conclusion: 在所研究的众包测试场景中，评估智能体不仅可作为事后评审，更可作为工作流中嵌入的反馈提供者，支持上游报告质量改进。

Abstract: Agentic AI is increasingly being integrated into software engineering workflows. In crowdsourced testing, however, the large volume and uneven quality of submitted reports still create a substantial review burden for developers. In prior work, we developed and validated a multi-agent assessment backbone based on the LLM-as-a-Judge paradigm. That backbone assesses reports along three dimensions--textuality, adequacy, and competitiveness--and was shown to align well with human consensus while substantially reducing assessment effort. Yet reliable automated judging does not by itself show whether agent outputs can improve human work when embedded into workflow. This paper studies that missing question in the context of crowdsourced testing. We investigate whether assessment-derived, actionable feedback can improve how testers revise reports, perform on later tasks, and transfer reporting practices across applications. To do so, we conducted a controlled four-stage human-subject study with 20 testers across three real-world applications. The results show that agent-generated feedback supports immediate improvements in revised reports, better first submissions on a new task after prior feedback exposure, and evidence of partial but meaningful transfer to a later application. A post-task questionnaire completed by 17 participants complements these artifact-based findings by suggesting that the feedback was generally understandable, acted upon in revision, and carried into later tasks, while also revealing remaining friction in specificity and execution. Overall, the study provides empirical evidence that, in the studied crowdsourced testing setting, assessment agents can serve not only as post-hoc judges but also as workflow-integrated feedback providers that support upstream report-quality improvement.

</details>


### [345] [From Failed Trajectories to Reliable LLM Agents: Diagnosing and Repairing Harness Flaws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06324)
*Mengzhuo Chen,Junjie Wang,Zhe Liu,Yawen Wang,Qing Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: HarnessFix是一种基于追踪的框架，通过将执行轨迹编译为HTIR中间表示，诊断和修复LLM agent的harness（执行环境、工具接口、上下文等）中的故障，在多个基准测试上使性能提升15.2%–50.0%，并超越了人工设计和自演化基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自我改进方法和自动harness演化虽然能优化agent，但往往无法准确定位故障轨迹中的责任证据和导致不可靠行为的具体harness层，导致修改范围过宽、间接或不够精确。

Method: 1) 将原始执行轨迹和harness代码编译为Harness-aware Trace Intermediate Representation (HTIR)，标准化轨迹证据并捕获步骤级来源和控制流关系。2) 将失败归因到具体的轨迹步骤和harness层，将重复诊断合并为可操作的缺陷记录，并映射到范围明确的修复算子。3) 生成并在缺陷特定修复规范下验证harness补丁，减少目标缺陷且不引入不可接受的回归。

Result: 在SWE-Bench Verified、Terminal-Bench 2.0 Verified、GAIA和AppWorld上，HarnessFix使初始harness的测试性能提升15.2%–50.0%，优于人类设计和自演化基线，并揭示了跨ETCLOVG层的常见harness缺陷模式。

Conclusion: HarnessFix通过细粒度的故障诊断和范围精确的修复，有效改进了LLM agent的harness质量，证明了追踪导向的harness修复方法的有效性。

Abstract: LLM-based agents increasingly rely on harnesses that provide execution environments, tool interfaces, context, lifecycle orchestration, observability, verification, and governance. Existing self-improving agents and automatic harness evolution methods mainly improve agents through runtime supervision, prompt optimization, workflow search, or harness modification based on final outcomes. However, they often fail to diagnose where the responsible evidence lies in failed trajectories and which harness layer causes the unreliable behavior, resulting in broad, indirect, or poorly scoped changes. This paper proposes HarnessFix, a trace-guided framework for diagnosing agent failures and repairing agent harnesses. HarnessFix compiles raw execution traces and harness code into a Harness-aware Trace Intermediate Representation (HTIR), which normalizes fragmented trajectory evidence and captures step-level provenance and control-flow relations. It then attributes failures to responsible trajectory steps and harness layers, consolidates recurring diagnoses into actionable flaw records, and maps them to scoped repair operators. Finally, HarnessFix generates and validates harness patches under flaw-specific repair specifications to reduce target flaws without introducing unacceptable regressions. We evaluate HarnessFix on SWE-Bench Verified, Terminal-Bench 2.0 Verified, GAIA and AppWorld. Across these benchmarks, HarnessFix improves held-out test performance over the initial harnesses by 15.2%--50.0%, outperforms human-designed and self-evolution baselines, and reveals recurring harness-flaw patterns across ETCLOVG layers.

</details>


### [346] [Scaffold, Not Vocabulary? A Controlled, Two-Tier, Pre-Registered Study of a Popperian Code-Generation Skill](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06454)
*Mehmet Iscan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过控制实验发现，提示词“技能”（如要求模型以波普尔证伪主义方式推理）对代码生成的提升效果并非来自其方法论内容，而是来自提示词本身的结构性框架（如标题和分段）。在大模型上所有条件均达到天花板效应，小模型上完整技能与仅保留标签的支架无显著差异，且模型自评不可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究声称给大语言模型配备“科学推理”提示技能（如波普尔证伪主义）能提升代码生成质量，但这些评估大多依赖LLM作为裁判，存在偏差。作者质疑：所谓提升究竟来自技能的方法论内容，还是任何提示支架带来的结构效应？

Method: 作者设计了双层消融实验：包含长度匹配的安慰剂、仅保留标签的支架（去掉波普尔程序内容）、执行测试（HumanEval+单元测试）、词汇光环哨兵和同模型自判审计。在Claude Sonnet 4.6和Qwen2.5-Coder-0.5B两个模型上测试。

Result: 大模型上所有条件接近天花板，无法区分；小模型上结构化支架带来20-22点提升，但完整技能与仅标签支架无显著差异（F@8=L@8 vs V@8=34.8%），安慰剂仅落后2.4点。0.5B模型的自我判断不比随机选择好，且60%选择集中在同一索引。

Conclusion: 在测试的两种设置下，波普尔程序内容没有带来超越标签支架的可分离执行正确性收益，提升来自支架结构。本文贡献了一个校准的阴性结果和可复用的解耦协议，此发现限定了特定提示技能族的工程主张，而非对波普尔方法论本身的评价。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly write, review, and judge code, and a fast-growing practice equips them with prompt 'skills' that ask the model to reason like a scientist. A prominent example tells the model to act as a Popperian falsificationist, and such skills are reported to improve generated code. But these gains are almost always read off an LLM-as-a-judge, an instrument with documented positional, self-preference, and stylistic biases. We ask: if it appears to help, is the gain from the skill's Popperian content, or from the structure any scaffold imposes? We pre-register a two-tier ablation with three controls: a length-matched placebo, a labels-only scaffold that keeps the Popperian headers but strips the procedure, and an execution oracle (HumanEval+ unit tests), plus a vocabulary-halo sentinel and a same-model self-judge audit. On a frontier model (Claude Sonnet 4.6, N=163) all conditions sit near the benchmark ceiling and do not separate, so the pre-registered +5-point improvement is not supported (a ceiling-limited non-detection). On a small model (Qwen2.5-Coder-0.5B, N=164) structured arms lift best-of-eight correctness by 20-22 points, but the full skill shows no separable benefit over a labels-only scaffold (aggregate F@8=L@8 vs V@8=34.8%), and the placebo trails by only 2.4 points. A 0.5B self-judge applying the Popperian rubric does not beat random selection and concentrates 60% of its picks on one index. In the two settings tested, the skill's Popperian procedural content adds no separable execution-correctness benefit beyond a labels-only scaffold, so the gains track scaffold structure. We contribute a calibrated negative result and a reusable disambiguation protocol; the finding bounds an engineering claim about one prompt-skill family and is not an evaluation of Popperian methodology in general.

</details>


### [347] [Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06492)
*Liliana Hotsko,Yinxi Li,Yuntian Deng,Pengyu Nie*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Code2LoRA是一种超网络框架，能够生成仓库特定的LoRA适配器，在零推理token开销下注入仓库级知识。支持静态（快照转适配器）和演进（GRU隐藏状态随代码diff更新）两种场景。在RepoPeftBench基准上，静态变体达到63.8%跨仓库和66.2%仓库内精确匹配，演进变体达到60.3%跨仓库精确匹配，均优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码语言模型需要仓库级上下文来解析导入、API和项目约定，但现有方法（RAG长输入、逐仓库微调/LoRA）成本高昂且难以应对仓库规模扩展和代码库演进。

Method: 提出Code2LoRA超网络框架，包含两个变体：Code2LoRA-Static（单仓库快照→LoRA适配器，适用于稳定代码库）和Code2LoRA-Evo（GRU隐藏状态随代码diff更新适配器，适用于演进的代码库）。同时构建了RepoPeftBench基准，包含604个Python仓库的静态和演进两个评测轨。

Result: 静态轨：跨仓库63.8%、仓库内66.2%精确匹配，与逐仓库LoRA上限持平；演进轨：跨仓库60.3%精确匹配，比单一共享LoRA高5.2个百分点。

Conclusion: Code2LoRA通过生成式适配器注入仓库知识，在零推理开销下达到或超过传统微调方法的性能，为仓库级代码理解提供了高效、可扩展的新范式。

Abstract: Code language models need repository-level context to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions. Existing methods inject this knowledge as long inputs (retrieved through RAG or dependency analysis) or through per-repository fine-tuning and LoRA -- costly at repository scale and brittle to evolving codebases. We introduce Code2LoRA, a hypernetwork framework that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters, effectively injecting repository knowledge with zero inference-time token overhead. Code2LoRA supports two usage scenarios: Code2LoRA-Static converts a single repository snapshot into an adapter, suitable for comprehension of stable codebases; while Code2LoRA-Evo maintains an adapter backed by a GRU hidden state updated per code diff, suitable for active development of evolving codebases. To evaluate Code2LoRA against parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines, we build RepoPeftBench, a benchmark of 604 Python repositories with two tracks: a static track with 40K training and 12K test assertion-completion tasks, and an evolution track with 215K commit-derived training and 87K commit-derived test tasks. On the static track, Code2LoRA-Static achieves 63.8% cross-repo and 66.2% in-repo exact match, matching the per-repository LoRA upper bound; on the evolution track, Code2LoRA-Evo achieves 60.3% cross-repo exact match (+5.2 pp over a single shared LoRA). Code2LoRA's code can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code2lora-6857; the model checkpoints and RepoPeftBench datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/code2lora.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [348] [The Evaluation Blind Spot: A Stereological Theory of Benchmark Coverage for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05169)
*Jason Z Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套立体学理论来分析LLM基准测试的覆盖能力。研究发现，当前主流基准测试套件的有效维度d_eff在2.86到4.80之间，存在巨大的结构性盲点（比第二名分数差距大两个数量级，比统计噪声大52-127倍）。通过子模贪心算法，4个基准即可形成稳定核心，7个即可覆盖90%能力。此外，论文独立解决了Gardner 1995年的问题1.5，建立了C^2支撑函数在一般维度下的极小极大最优率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM基准测试缺乏理论框架来量化其覆盖能力，无法判断基准套件是否全面评估了模型能力，存在盲点问题。需要系统性的理论来理解基准测试的覆盖率、维度结构和信息冗余。

Method: 提出立体学理论框架，定义有效维度d_eff和可见Hausdorff距离；通过三个独立排行榜（Open LLM v2、12基准扩展套件、LiveBench）进行实证分析；采用卡方投影模型进行模拟；使用子模贪心算法（Nemhauser 1-1/e保证）选择核心基准；通过反事实验证（12个内部基准和27个Chatbot Arena类别）验证特征结构预测能力；独立解决Gardner问题1.5，利用S^(D-1)上的最优恢复理论。

Result: 三个排行榜有效维度d_eff在[2.86, 4.80]之间；结构性盲点比分差大两个数量级，是统计噪声的52-127倍；模拟中Top-2模型的半分割交换率稳定在[0.38, 0.49]；500次随机可见/隐藏分割中92%交换了Top-1排名；4个基准构成稳定核心，7个基准达到90%覆盖率；训练子集跨时间季度保留率93-97%；反事实验证显示特征结构能预测不可替代评估（rho=-0.69, p=0.013）和新信息评估（rho=+0.38）。

Conclusion: 现有LLM基准测试套件存在严重的维度盲点和结构冗余，少量基准即可捕获大部分信息。论文的理论框架为设计高效、无偏的基准测试提供了数学基础，同时独立解决了经典几何问题，贡献具有跨领域意义。

Abstract: We give a stereological theory of LLM benchmark coverage. For any suite with effective dimensionality d_eff, the visible Hausdorff distance between two convex capability profiles consistent with the same scores is bounded by epsilon + C R m^(-1/(d_eff-1)), with matching Lipschitz lower bound. Empirically, three independent leaderboards (Open LLM v2, an extended 12-benchmark suite, LiveBench) all have d_eff in [2.86, 4.80] on their competitive frontier; the structural blind spot exceeds the observed runner-up score gap by two orders of magnitude and dominates statistical noise by 52-127x. Under a chi-squared projection model, the isotropic prior is the optimistic case; across six hidden-capability priors and four ambient dimensions the simulated half-split swap rate of the top two models stays in [0.38, 0.49], and a 500-trial random visible/held-out split shows that 92% of trials swap the top-1 ranking with on average 2.83 of 5 top-5 models changing. A submodular greedy algorithm with the Nemhauser (1 - 1/e) guarantee finds a stable core of 4 benchmarks; 7 of 12 suffice for 90% coverage, and the trained subset transfers across temporal quarters with 93-97% retention. A counterfactual validation across 12 internal benchmarks and 27 Chatbot Arena categories confirms that the eigenstructure predicts which evaluations are irreplaceable (rho = -0.69, p = 0.013 for removal disruption) and which external evaluations bring new information (rho = +0.38). As a second, independent theoretical contribution, we resolve Gardner's Problem 1.5 (1995) for C^2 support functions, establishing the minimax rate Theta(R/(kappa m^(2/(D-1)))) in general dimension via optimal recovery theory on S^(D-1).

</details>


### [349] [ERRORQUAKE: Heavy-Tailed Error Severity Distributions in Open-Weight Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05170)
*Jason Z Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Errorquake-10k基准测试，以0-4连续严重度评分替代传统二元错误分类，发现不同开源LLM在匹配准确率下错误严重度分布存在显著差异，证明严重度分布与错误率承载非冗余信息，建议将严重度分布与准确率一并报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统幻觉基准将所有错误视为等价，但"错误日期"与"虚构法庭判决"严重度相差数个数量级。需要更精细的评估框架来捕捉错误严重度的分布差异。

Method: 构建10,000查询基准Errorquake-10k，采用0-4连续严重度评分，覆盖8领域5难度层级；拟合21个开源模型的严重度分布；提出严重度分布指数b（Gutenberg-Richter上尾斜率）；通过519项三评委人类验证研究确认可靠性。

Result: 210个模型对中85对在匹配精度下b的95%置信区间不重叠；严重度分布与错误率信息非冗余（条件互信息1.56 bits，64.5%的b方差无法由错误率解释）；低严重度错误71%为检索错误，高严重度错误39%为编造。

Conclusion: 严重度分布应作为准确率的补充指标报告，它携带错误率无法捕捉的判别性信息。

Abstract: At matched accuracy, open-weight LLMs differ substantially in the shape of their error severity distribution -- a difference invisible to the scalar error rate. Hallucination benchmarks report a single error count and treat all errors as equivalent, yet a wrong date and a fabricated court ruling differ by orders of magnitude. We introduce Errorquake-10k, a 10,000-query benchmark scoring each response on a continuous 0-4 severity scale across 8 domains and 5 difficulty tiers, and we fit per-model severity distributions for 21 open-weight models. For each model we estimate a severity distribution index (b, the Gutenberg-Richter upper-tail slope) with 95% bootstrap confidence intervals. Headline: across the 210 model pairs, 85 have disjoint 95% b confidence intervals at matched accuracy (|Delta epsilon| < 0.05) on human-consensus scoring, e.g. deepseek-v3.2 vs. ministral-14b at epsilon = 0.586 and Delta b = 0.47. A 519-item three-rater human validation study confirms measurement reliability (ICC(2,k=3) = 0.85), validates the LLM-judge ranking (rho = 0.89), and confirms the dense-model scaling correlation on human data (rho_s = -0.86). We prove a Non-Reducibility Theorem showing that severity profile and error rate are informationally non-redundant (I(b; model | epsilon) = 1.56 bits; 64.5% of cross-model b variance is unexplained by epsilon). A severity mechanism taxonomy (kappa = 0.83) reveals that error type shifts categorically with severity: low-severity errors are retrievals (71%); high-severity errors are fabrications (39%) -- and this composition differs by model size (p < 0.0001). Severity distribution should be reported alongside accuracy; it carries discriminative information that the error rate cannot.

</details>


### [350] [Staged Factorial Screening for Budget-Constrained Micro-Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05186)
*Felipe Chavarro Polania*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在预算受限的微预训练场景中，通过分阶段分式因子实验设计，在613次实验（2-10分钟短预算）及24小时延伸实验中，发现总批量、深度和宽度在短预算下惩罚最大，且随机搜索虽能找到强基线但无法归因因子，最终提出以桥接模型为中心的有限预算推荐策略，而非硬件无关的排序或通用超参数优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在预算受限的微预训练中，大量候选方案需要先在共享加速器上筛选，然后再投入更大的搜索预算。作者希望研究分阶段分式因子工作流能否在这种设定下稳定地恢复早期效应结构，从而高效地筛选重要因子。

Method: 在固定自动研究衍生的单GPU训练循环上，运行了613次实验，包括2、5、10分钟的试点和后续筛选；5和10分钟的完整16条件种子的重跑；定向种子锚点检查；同主机贪心和匹配成本随机基线；60分钟桥接包；以及跨Windows A100和Linux L40S的24小时有限锚点延伸。使用Benjamini-Hochberg校正进行因子显著性检验。

Result: 主效应惩罚（总批量、深度、宽度）在短预算下最大，随预算增加而缓解。在预声明的种子全屏系列中，D、A、B、C在5和10分钟时保持非零估计（经BH校正），而E则不显著。随机搜索能触及强基线，但反复落入同一低惩罚区域且无法归因因子。60分钟桥接锚点均值最低，但其无法分离工作流改进与更大桥接模型容量优势。在12和24小时三锚点延伸中，桥接模型样本均值最低，但非桥接模型的排序表现出主机敏感性。

Conclusion: 作者提出了一个有限预算的方法论结论：使用短设计筛选来识别高惩罚方向，在重复运行下确认有前景的锚点，然后在缩小的空间内进行局部优化。证据支持在两个主机24小时内以桥接模型为中心的推荐，但不支持硬件无关的排序或通用超参数优化的优越性。

Abstract: Budget-constrained micro-pretraining often requires triaging many candidate recipes on a shared accelerator before larger search budgets are spent. We study whether a staged fractional-factorial workflow can recover stable early effect structure in this setting. On a fixed autoresearch-derived single-GPU training loop, we run 613 experiments across pilot and follow-up screens at 2, 5, and 10 minutes; full 16-condition seeded reruns at 5 and 10 minutes; targeted seeded anchor checks; same-host greedy and matched-cost random baselines; a 60-minute bridge package; and bounded Windows A100 and Linux L40S anchor continuations through 24 hours. Main penalties from total batch, depth, and width are largest at short budgets and relax as budget increases. Within the predeclared seeded full-screen families, D, A, B, and C retain non-zero estimates at 5 and 10 minutes after within-budget Benjamini-Hochberg correction, while E does not. Random search can reach strong incumbents in this 32-condition space, but repeatedly in the same low-penalty region and without factor attribution. The 60-minute bridge anchor has the lowest mean, although that package does not separate workflow refinement from the larger bridge model's capacity advantage. In bounded 12-hour and 24-hour three-anchor continuations on both hosts, the bridge has the lowest sample mean while the non-bridge ordering stays host-sensitive. We therefore present a bounded methods result: use short designed screens to identify high-penalty directions, confirm promising anchors under repeated runs, and refine locally inside the reduced space. The evidence supports a bridge-centered recommendation through 24 hours on two hosts, not hardware-invariant ranking or general hyperparameter-optimization superiority.

</details>


### [351] [PyCC.id: A package for hypothesis-driven equation discovery with structural identifiability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05191)
*Federico J. Gonzalez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了PyCC库，一种基于特征曲线（CC）骨架的结构化方法，用于从时间序列数据中发现常微分方程，通过融入领域假设和先验知识来应对逆问题的不适定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据驱动方程发现面临逆问题不适定性的挑战，即多个数学模型都能同样好地拟合数据。现有方法虽然能通过引入假设缩小搜索空间，但仍会产生多个候选模型，需要依赖专家进行后验人工筛选。

Method: 提出基于特征曲线（CC）骨架的假设驱动方法：用户定义与ODE族关联的骨架结构，并基于领域知识迭代添加假设和先验来精炼模型。该方法具有模块化特点，可兼容神经网络、符号回归、稀疏回归等多种方程发现范式。

Result: 开发了Python库PyCC，将上述方法实现为灵活工具，支持研究人员和工程师自定义骨架和假设，从时间依赖数据中发现ODE。

Conclusion: PyCC库为数据驱动方程发现提供了一种结构化、假设驱动的范式，其模块化设计允许融合多种发现方法，且部分骨架具有可证明的结构可辨识性，有助于判断骨架的正确性。

Abstract: Data-driven equation discovery is fundamentally an inverse problem that seeks to infer the governing differential equations of a system directly from time-series measurements. A known issue is the ill-conditioned nature of the inverse problem, which frequently produces multiple mathematical models that fit the data similarly well. One path to address this issue is by incorporating known hypotheses and constraints into the training phase beforehand. While this approach effectively reduces the search space, it still results in multiple candidate models, forcing practitioners to rely on post-hoc manual filtering based on their own domain expertise. A recent approach incorporates structural `skeletons' inspired by characteristic curves (CCs), defining a hypothesis-driven methodology. In this methodology, practitioners define a skeleton, which is associated with a family of ordinary differential equations (ODEs), and then add their hypotheses and priors based on their domain knowledge to refine the obtained model iteratively. An important advantage of this approach is that some skeletons have demonstrable structural identifiability properties, which are useful for checking whether the skeleton is correct or should be discarded. Furthermore, this formalism enables the use of multiple equation discovery paradigms due to its modularity (such as neural networks, symbolic regression, and sparse regression). In this work, we present the Python library PyCC, which condenses these efforts into a flexible tool that allows researchers and engineers to seamlessly define their skeletons and hypotheses to discover ODEs from time-dependent data.

</details>


### [352] [Temporal Preference Concepts and their Functions in a Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05194)
*Ian Rios-Sialer,Shantanu Darveshi,Shuai Jiang,Avigya Paudel,Anastasiia Pronina,Ipshita Bandyopadhyay,Justin Shenk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过因果定位和激活修补等方法，在Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507模型中定位了处理时间偏好的神经子图，发现LLM对未来的折现比人类更缓和，且这种偏好不稳定，可通过引导向量进行调控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM越来越多地被用于需要权衡短期收益与长期后果的决策场景，但对其内部如何表征和解决这种权衡知之甚少，因此有必要进行机制性研究。

Method: 使用梯度归因和激活修补的汇聚证据，因果定位了时间偏好的底层子图；通过残差流分析时间跨度的几何表征；进行行为分析比较LLM与人类的折现率；探索引导向量对时间偏好的调控能力。

Result: 发现时间跨度的几何信息编码在残差流的预期局部层；LLM对未来的折现比人类缓和数倍，但这种偏好跨上下文不稳定；引导向量可一定程度上改变时间偏好。

Conclusion: 研究表明，机制可解释性有助于实现对LLM规划与推理中时间偏好的可靠控制，而非依赖隐含的训练信号。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being deployed to make decisions that require trading off near-term gains against long-term consequences, yet little is known about how they internally represent or resolve these tradeoffs. In this work, we causally localize an underlying subgraph for temporal preference in a distilled LLM (Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507), identifying mid-to-upper-layer nodes through converging evidence from gradient-based attribution and activation patching. We find that the geometry of time horizon is encoded in the residual stream at the expected localized layers. A behavioral analysis reveals that unintervened LLMs discount the future several times less steeply than humans, yet this preference is unstable across contexts, motivating explicit control rather than implicit reliance on training. Finally, we find suggestive evidence that steering vectors can shift temporal preference. Our work demonstrates how mechanistic interpretability can bring us closer to reliable control over how LLMs plan and reason

</details>


### [353] [State commitment learning: training language models to distinguish computation from memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05201)
*Fei Ding,Yongkang Zhang,Runhao Liu,Yuhao Liao,Zijian Zeng,Huiming Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出状态承诺学习（State Commitment Learning）和反事实擦除强化学习（CERL），让推理语言模型学会区分临时计算与持久状态，通过擦除隐藏思维后仍能保持答案正确的训练，减少模型对临时推理记录的依赖，在数学、逻辑、科学QA和多轮工具使用任务中表现优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前推理语言模型将计算用的token与持久状态的token混为一谈，所有隐藏思考（包括失败的尝试、死胡同）都保留在上下文中影响后续推理，导致模型可能依赖本不该依赖的临时计算内容，降低了推理的可靠性和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出状态承诺学习（State Commitment Learning），核心创新是反事实擦除强化学习（CERL）：在相同前缀下，同时评估保留隐藏思维的路径和擦除隐藏思维的路径，只有当擦除路径仍能保持正确时才给予奖励。同时引入持久状态充分性（Persistent-State Sufficiency）作为可训练和可度量的标准。

Result: 在数学、长链逻辑推理、科学QA和多轮工具使用评估中，CERL显著降低了模型答案对隐藏思维的依赖，且不牺牲准确率，表现优于仅奖励正确性的RL和长答案SFT基线方法。

Conclusion: 模型应学会区分临时计算与持久状态，CERL通过反事实擦除机制有效实现这一目标，提升了推理的鲁棒性和可靠性，为推理语言模型的设计提供了新方向。

Abstract: Reasoning language models do not distinguish tokens used for computation from tokens that constitute persistent state: once generated, all hidden thoughts remain in context and influence future predictions. As a result, downstream reasoning may depend on failed attempts, dead ends, and private scratch work that should not be safely relied on later. We recast this phenomenon as a new training objective, state commitment learning: training models to explicitly distinguish information that should be committed as persistent state from temporary computation that can be discarded. We define a counterfactual criterion, persistent-state sufficiency, which makes it trainable and measurable whether an answer remains usable after hidden thoughts are erased. We then propose Counterfactual Erasure RL (CERL), which evaluates, under the same prefix, both a path that keeps hidden thoughts and a path that erases them, and gives reward only when the erasure path remains correct. We also introduce the Erasure Dependence Protocol and show across mathematics, long-chain logic, scientific QA, and multi-turn tool-use evaluation that CERL substantially reduces answer dependence on hidden thoughts without sacrificing accuracy, consistently outperforming correctness-only RL and long-answer SFT baselines.

</details>


### [354] [Gradient Descent with Large Step Size Restores Symmetry in Deep Linear Networks with Multi-Pathway](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05219)
*Hee-Sung Kim,Sungyoon Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度线性网络中梯度下降（GD）与大学习率对路径竞争的影响，发现离散GD在稳定性边缘（Edge of Stability）的振荡会打破梯度流（GF）预测的“赢家通吃”现象，导致信号在多个路径间重新分配，倾向于共享表示而非单路径主导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有的多路径深度线性网络分析主要基于Gradient Flow（GF），预测路径对称性破缺和“赢家通吃”的专门化。然而，离散梯度下降（GD）在大步长下的行为与GF不同，本文旨在揭示这种差异及其背后的机制。

Method: 理论分析证明单路径解是尖锐极小值，而多路径分配可降低锐度；通过研究离散GD在稳定性边缘的振荡行为，展示其在训练后期如何覆盖深度驱动的对称性破缺，进入重新平衡阶段，使信号在路径间重新分布。

Result: 早期训练复现了深度驱动的对称性破缺；但稳定性边缘的振荡随后覆盖了这一趋势，驱动网络进入重新平衡阶段，信号在多路径间重新分配。

Conclusion: 深度塑造了路径竞争，大步长GD倾向于共享表示而非持续的单路径主导。

Abstract: Recent analyses of multi-pathway Deep Linear Networks use Gradient Flow to predict a "winner-takes-all" specialization in which path symmetry breaks and each feature concentrates in a single pathway. In this work, we show that discrete Gradient Descent (GD) with a large step size tells a different story. We prove that single-path solutions are sharp minima, whereas distributing signals across pathways reduces sharpness by a factor that decreases with both the number of pathways and depth. Consequently, while early training reproduces the depth-driven symmetry breaking predicted by GF, oscillations at the Edge of Stability subsequently override this tendency and drive the network into a re-balancing phase, where signals redistribute across pathways. Together, these results clarify how depth shapes pathway competition and explain why large-step GD favors shared representations rather than persistent single-pathway dominance.

</details>


### [355] [Differentiable Efficient Operator Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05232)
*Xiaohuan Pei,Jiyuan Zhang,Yuanfan Guo,Weiguo Feng,Tao Huang,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Chang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出高效算子搜索（EOS），将多种视觉token缩减算子统一到一个可微分搜索框架中，自动搜索缩减位置、保留数量及处理方式，在保持性能的同时显著提升多模态推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效多模态基础模型依赖手动设计的token缩减算子（剪枝、合并、池化、自适应加权等），但这些算子看似不同且缺乏统一理解，手动设计耗时且难以达到最优。

Method: 提出可微分的EOS框架，将层激活、保留预算和算子行为参数化，在单边预算和成本约束下联合搜索缩减位置、保留数量及信息处理方式。

Result: 在多项多模态基准上，搜索得到的算子实现了竞争性的精度-效率权衡，尤其在激进的视觉token缩减场景下表现优异。

Conclusion: 高效多模态推理可以从手动算子设计转向可微分算子搜索。

Abstract: Efficient multimodal foundation models often rely on manually designed token-reduction operators, such as pruning, merging, pooling, and adaptive reweighting. Although these operators appear different, we show that they can be interpreted as distinct regimes of a shared operator space. Based on this view, we introduce Efficient Operator Search, a differentiable framework that jointly searches where to reduce tokens, how many tokens to retain, and how reduced token information should be processed. The proposed search space parameterizes layer activation, retention budget, and operator behavior, while the search policy optimizes task performance under one-sided budget and cost constraints. This formulation recovers representative hand-designed baselines as special cases and further discovers hybrid operators beyond isolated manual designs. Experiments on multimodal benchmarks show that the searched operators achieve competitive accuracy-efficiency trade-offs, especially under aggressive visual-token reduction. These results suggest that efficient multimodal inference can be reframed from manual operator design to differentiable operator search.

</details>


### [356] [DiffSlack: Learning under Nonlinear Inequality Constraints via Learnable Slack Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05247)
*Ziqian Wang,Chenxi Fang,Zhen Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DiffSlack，一种可微投影层，通过可学习松弛变量将非线性不等式约束转化为等式，结合阻尼高斯-牛顿投影实现硬约束满足，在车辆路径规划任务中超越现有基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络中强制执行非线性不等式约束仍然困难，尤其是当输出受大量耦合约束时。现有硬约束方法对约束集施加结构限制或引入大量计算开销。

Method: 1) 将不等式重写为带可学习松弛变量的等式；2) 松弛变量作为网络增广输出的一部分预测，为阻尼高斯-牛顿投影提供数据驱动热启动；3) 投影层将原始预测映射到增广可行流形，保持端到端可微性；4) 两阶段课程学习稳定训练并改善约束满足。

Result: 在包含200个非线性不等式约束（避碰、曲率限制、路径点间距）的车辆路径规划中，DiffSlack比现有基线实现更高规划成功率和更强几何约束满足。消融实验显示硬投影层降低了对监督质量的敏感性。CARLA和真实车辆实验确认轨迹可执行性。

Conclusion: DiffSlack为将硬不等式约束嵌入神经网络提供了一种实用且可扩展的方法，适用于工程应用。

Abstract: Enforcing nonlinear inequality constraints in neural networks remains challenging, especially when the output is subject to many coupled constraints. Existing hard constraint methods often impose structural restrictions on the constraint set or introduce substantial computational overhead for large-scale nonlinear problems. Here, we propose DiffSlack, a differentiable projection layer for nonlinear inequality-constrained neural prediction. DiffSlack reformulates inequalities as equalities with learnable slack variables, which are predicted as part of the augmented network output and provide a data-driven warm start for damped Gauss-Newton projection. The projection layer maps raw predictions onto the augmented feasible manifold while preserving end-to-end differentiability. A two-stage curriculum further stabilizes training and improves constraint satisfaction. We evaluate DiffSlack on vehicle path planning with 200 nonlinear inequality constraints from collision avoidance, curvature limits, and waypoint spacing. Compared with existing learning-based baselines, DiffSlack achieves a higher planning success rate and stronger geometric constraint satisfaction under a comparable inference budget. Ablation studies further show that the hard projection layer reduces sensitivity to supervision quality. Closed-loop tracking in CARLA and real-world vehicle experiments confirms the executability of the generated trajectories. These results demonstrate that DiffSlack provides a practical and scalable approach to embedding hard inequality constraints into neural networks for engineering applications.

</details>


### [357] [Alpha-RTL: Test-Time Training for RTL Hardware Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05253)
*Peilong Zhou,Zhirong Chen,Cangyuan Li,Haoyu Gao,Kaiyan Chang,Ziming Qu,Ying Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TTT-RTL，一种在测试时通过EDA反馈（语法检查、仿真、PPA）对LLM策略进行强化学习微调的方法，用于优化RTL硬件设计，在多个基准上显著降低PPA乘积。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么训练通用RTL生成器后直接部署，要么在测试时仅用冻结策略进行搜索，无法针对具体RTL问题动态适应EDA反馈，限制了物理优化能力。

Method: 提出TTT-RTL框架：1) 采样候选RTL实现；2) 通过语法检查和仿真验证；3) 使用综合导出的PPA乘积对有效设计评分；4) 通过PUCT索引的设计状态池重用高奖励变体；5) 采用熵策略梯度目标更新策略；并引入自适应KL预算控制器（参考KL、有效样本量、奖励饱和信号）稳定策略更新。

Result: 在RTLLM v2.0（Nangate 45nm）上，几何平均PPA乘积降低65.1%，优于最强冻结策略基线（26.1%）；在工业级XuanTie C910 FPU前导零预测单元（Sky130）上实现59.4%的ADP降低。

Conclusion: 测试时训练结合可执行EDA反馈，能够将LLM的RTL生成从功能正确性推进到物理优化阶段，策略自适应、状态复用和KL预算控制均贡献显著。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown increasing promise in generating
  functionally correct register-transfer-level (RTL) hardware designs.
  Recent systems improve further through EDA-integrated reinforcement
  learning with syntax, simulation, and PPA rewards, but train a general
  RTL generator before deployment while test-time approaches search with
  a frozen policy. We instead perform reinforcement learning at test time,
  allowing the LLM policy to adapt to executable EDA feedback for the
  specific RTL problem at hand. We propose TTT-RTL, to our knowledge the
  first per-design test-time training framework that closes the loop
  between an LLM policy and an EDA pipeline for RTL optimization. TTT-RTL
  samples candidate implementations, verifies them through syntax checking
  and simulation, scores valid designs using synthesis-derived PPA product,
  reuses high-reward variants through a PUCT-indexed design-state pool,
  and updates the policy with an entropic policy-gradient objective. To
  stabilize policy updates under sparse or plateaued rewards, we introduce
  an adaptive KL-budget controller that adjusts the entropy constraint
  using reference KL, effective sample size, and reward saturation signals.
  On RTLLM v2.0 under Nangate 45nm, TTT-RTL reduces the geometric-mean
  PPA product by 65.1% over the reference, outperforming the strongest
  published frozen-policy agent baseline at 26.1%. On an industrial
  XuanTie C910 FPU leading-zero-anticipation unit under Sky130, TTT-RTL
  achieves a 59.4% ADP reduction, and ablations confirm that policy
  adaptation, state reuse, and KL-budget control each contribute. These
  results suggest that test-time training with executable EDA feedback can
  move LLM-based RTL generation beyond functional correctness toward
  physically optimized hardware.

</details>


### [358] [Scaling Laws for Behavioral Foundation Models over User Event Sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05257)
*Rickard Brüel Gabrielsson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了行为基础模型（如推荐、支付、欺诈检测等领域使用用户行为序列训练的模型）的缩放定律。通过约600次实验，发现在两部件架构（特征嵌入器+解码器Transformer）中，小嵌入器（约2%参数）在计算最优性上始终最佳；计算最优训练在低计算量时比文本模型更偏数据密集，但随计算量增加趋向Chinchilla启发式；评估指标本身会影响缩放定律，包括最优批次大小、负采样数量等。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型有成熟的缩放定律（如Chinchilla），但行为基础模型（如推荐、支付、欺诈建模）缺乏类似的compute calibration指导。本文旨在填补这一空白，为行为模型建立可量化的缩放规律。

Method: 研究两部件架构：特征事件嵌入器（将多模态项目映射为向量）+ 解码器-only Transformer（预测下一个事件）。在真实交互数据上进行约600次运行，覆盖10^15-10^19 FLOPs，联合变化四个维度：两部件参数分配比例、关键批次大小、模型/数据分配、冻结嵌入器后的负采样数量。

Result: 1) 小嵌入器（约2%参数）在所有计算预算下计算最优；2) 低计算量时训练应偏向数据密集，随计算量增加D/N比趋向Chinchilla；3) 采样训练目标与部署排序指标之间存在系统性差异，关键批次大小、最优负采样数、损失与排序质量的一致性均随计算量和评估指标变化；4) 更大预算偏好更多负样本，到10^19 FLOPs时限制因素变为候选轴内存而非FLOPs。

Conclusion: 在行为基础模型中，评估指标本身是缩放定律的一部分：改变评估指标会改变计算最优配方。这挑战了语言模型领域将评估指标视为外生变量的传统做法，对行为模型的工程实践具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly trained on sequences of user actions in recommendation, payments, fraud, and commerce, but these models still lack the kind of compute calibration that scaling laws provide for language models. We study a common two-part behavioral-model architecture: a feature-based event embedder maps each multi-modal item to a vector, and a decoder-only transformer predicts the next event from the resulting sequence. Across roughly 600 runs on real interaction data, spanning $10^{15}$-$10^{19}$ training FLOPs, we jointly vary four deployment-relevant axes: the two-part parameter split, critical batch size, model/data allocation, and the number of sampled negatives used after freezing the embedder. A small embedder ($s^{\star}\!\approx\!2\%$ of parameters) is compute-optimal at every budget we test because embedder parameters are both more expensive per step and exposed to far more repeated items than contextualizer parameters. Compute-optimal training is data-heavy relative to text at low compute, but its $D/N$ ratio moves toward the Chinchilla heuristic as compute increases. The sampled training objective and deployed ranking metrics disagree in ways that themselves scale: critical batch size, optimal negative count after freezing, and the agreement between loss and ranking quality all shift with compute and with the chosen evaluation metric. For negative sampling, larger budgets increasingly prefer more negatives; by $10^{19}$ FLOPs the active constraint is candidate-axis memory rather than FLOPs. In behavioral foundation models, the evaluation metric is therefore part of the scaling law: changing it can change the compute-optimal recipe.

</details>


### [359] [Flash-WAM: Modality-Aware Distillation for World Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05254)
*Arman Akbari,Ci Zhang,Arash Akbari,Lin Zhao,Yixiao Chen,Weiwei Chen,Xuan Zhang,Geng Yuan,Yanzhi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flash-WAM提出了一种模态感知的步骤蒸馏框架，将视频-动作联合扩散模型的推理压缩到单步，实现23倍加速（8.1秒→348毫秒），在保持任务成功率的同时支持实时控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的World-action models（WAMs）联合生成视频和机器人动作，性能优秀但需要大量去噪步骤，无法实现实时控制。虽然步骤蒸馏可以加速，但现成方法无法处理视频和动作流使用不同SNR偏移噪声调度导致的模态不对称问题。

Method: 提出Flash-WAM框架，受一致性蒸馏启发，为不同模态选择匹配其噪声 regime 的一致性函数：动作流低噪声区域使用线性梯度缩放参数化，视频流高噪声区域使用方差保持参数化。该设计基于对一致性函数族的结构分析。

Result: 在RoboTwin 2.0上将延迟从8.1秒降至348毫秒（23倍加速）；模拟基准上保持85.5%和95.7%的任务成功率；真实Unitree G1人形机器人上恢复60%的平均性能，而朴素一致性蒸馏仅24%。

Conclusion: Flash-WAM成功解决了多模态步骤蒸馏中因噪声调度差异导致的不对称问题，实现了单步推理下的实时机器人控制，且性能损失可控。

Abstract: World-action models (WAMs) jointly generate future video and robot actions through iterative diffusion, achieving strong performance on manipulation benchmarks but requiring tens of denoising steps, a cost that precludes real-time control. Step distillation has emerged as the natural remedy, but off-the-shelf methods break down in the joint video-action setting because video and action streams use different SNR-shifted noise schedules and reach training with substantially different marginal noise distributions, an asymmetry that single-modality distillation methods cannot accommodate. We introduce \textbf{Flash-WAM}, a modality-aware step-distillation framework inspired by consistency distillation that selects the consistency function for each modality to match its noise regime: a linear-gradient-scaling parametrization for the action stream's low-noise regime, paired with a variance-preserving parametrization for the video stream's high-noise regime, grounded in a structural analysis of the consistency-function family that characterizes the achievable gradient scaling under the consistency boundary condition. Instantiated on LingBot-VA, Flash-WAM compresses inference to a single step in each modality. On RoboTwin 2.0, this reduces per-chunk latency from $8.1$ seconds to $348$ ms on NVIDIA L40S, a $23{\times}$ speedup that enables real-time inference. Flash-WAM preserves task success on simulation benchmarks ($85.5\%$ RoboTwin 2.0, $95.7\%$ LIBERO) and substantially recovers real-world performance ($60\%$ average on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot), while naive consistency distillation drops to $24\%$ at the same step budget.

</details>


### [360] [Statistically Reliable LLM-Based Ranking Evaluation via Prediction-Powered Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05308)
*Abhishek Divekar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PRECISE框架，将Prediction-Powered Inference（PPI）扩展到排序评估指标，通过结合少量人工标注和大量LLM判断的样本，实现无偏估计。在ESCI基准测试中，用30个人工标注+Claude 3 Sonnet判断使Precision@4的标准误差降低21%；在生产系统中，使用100个人工标签准确识别出最优系统变体，A/B测试确认该排名带来+407bps的日销售额增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM作为评判者（LLM-as-judge）存在系统性偏差，而人工标注成本高昂。需要一个既能利用LLM的大规模评判能力，又能保证估计无偏性的框架来评估排序系统的质量。

Method: 将Prediction-Powered Inference（PPI）扩展到排序评估指标。针对层次化指标（如Precision@K），将输出空间计算复杂度从O(2^|C|)降低到O(2^K)，使得PPI可应用于每文档标注、每查询评估的场景。

Result: 在ESCI基准上，30个人工标注+Claude 3 Sonnet判断使Precision@4的标准误差从4.45降至3.50（降低21%）。在生产系统中仅用100个人工标签和2小时专家标注就正确识别出最优系统变体，A/B测试确认该排名带来+407bps日销售额增长。

Conclusion: PRECISE框架能有效结合少量人工标注与大量LLM评判，在保证无偏性的前提下显著降低排序评估指标的估计误差，具有实际生产应用价值。

Abstract: With PRECISE, we extended Prediction-Powered Inference to produce bias-corrected estimates of ranking evaluation metrics by combining a small human-labeled set with a large LLM-judged set. PPI is provably unbiased regardless of the LLM judge's error profile. We make it applicable to hierarchical metrics like Precision@K, where annotations are per-document but the metric is per-query, by reducing the output-space computation from O(2^|C|) to O(2^K). On the ESCI benchmark, augmenting 30 human annotations with Claude 3 Sonnet judgments reduces the standard error of Precision@4 estimates from 4.45 to 3.50 (a 21% relative reduction). In a production system, our framework correctly identified the best of three system variants from 100 human labels and 2 hours of domain-expert annotation; A/B testing confirmed this ranking with +407 bps in daily sales.

</details>


### [361] [Policy-Conditioned Counterfactual Credit for Verifiable Reinforcement Learning of Long-Horizon Language Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05263)
*Renwei Meng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CVT-RL算法，通过反事实贡献估计、干预有效性门控和可验证约束，将语言智能体的任务成功率从71.8%提升至78.9%，证据F1提升至82.8，作弊行为从7.2%降至3.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可验证奖励的强化学习方法中，长期语言智能体仍会学习到无依据的证据链、信念漂移以及满足终端检查的捷径动作；现有过程奖励大多是相关性的，无法估计步骤对最终成功是否真正贡献。

Method: 提出CVT-RL：1) 策略条件反事实贡献(PCCC)估计器，通过删除、语义替换、证据替换、工具输出扰动四种受控干预，采样冻结参考策略的连续片段，使用选择调整的双稳健估计器增强优势；2) 干预有效性门控；3) 增广拉格朗日方法约束无依据主张、跳过验证、工具篡改和不安全调用。

Result: 在长上下文QA、ALFWorld、ScienceWorld和网页/工具任务上，CVT-RL将平均任务成功率从非因果RL的71.8%和信息匹配反事实基线的75.4%提升至78.9%，证据F1从78.9提升至82.8，作弊率从7.2%降至3.9%。人类审计评估作弊率4.6%（基线8.1%），自适应检测规避攻击下仅升至7.1%。所有主要指标的Holm校正p<0.01。

Conclusion: 精心设计的反事实信用分配，配合有效性门控、诊断工具和可验证约束，为更可靠的长期语言智能体强化学习提供了可复现的路径。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves reasoning and tool use, yet long-horizon language agents still learn unsupported evidence chains, belief drift, and shortcut actions that satisfy terminal checks. Existing process rewards are mostly correlational: they reward retrieval-, reflection-, or verification-like steps without estimating whether the step contributes to final verified success under a specified intervention. We propose CVT-RL, a constrained policy-gradient algorithm with dense verifiable rewards, intervention-validity gating, and a policy-conditioned counterfactual contribution (PCCC) estimator. Deletion, semantic substitution, evidence substitution, and tool-output perturbation define separate controlled interventions; continuations are sampled from a frozen reference policy, and a selection-adjusted doubly robust estimator augments the advantage. Belief control uses only prefix-observable labels, while an augmented Lagrangian constrains unsupported claims, skipped verification, tool tampering, and unsafe calls. On long-context QA, ALFWorld, ScienceWorld, and web/tool tasks, CVT-RL improves average task success from 71.8% for compute-matched non-causal RL and 75.4% for an information-matched counterfactual-process baseline to 78.9%, improves evidence F1 from 78.9 to 82.8 over the information-matched baseline, and reduces measured hacking from 7.2% to 3.9%. Independent human audit estimates 4.6% hacking for CVT-RL versus 8.1% for the information-matched baseline, and adaptive detector-evasion attacks raise hacking only to 7.1%. Stratified bootstrap and mixed-effects tests give p<0.01 after Holm correction for all primary metrics. Carefully scoped counterfactual credit, paired with validity gating, diagnostics, and verifiable constraints, provides a reproducible route toward more reliable long-horizon RL for language agents.

</details>


### [362] [MolE-RAG: Molecular Structure-Enhanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Chemistry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05693)
*Joey Chan,Wonbin Kweon,Ashley Shin,Niharika Bhattacharjee,Pengcheng Jiang,Yue Guo,Jiawei Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MolE-RAG是一种无需训练的、以分子为中心的检索增强生成框架，通过检索化学文献、分子特异性信息和结构相似分子三种上下文来源，显著提升了大语言模型在分子性质预测任务上的性能，分类ROC-AUC最高提升28个百分点，回归RMSE最高降低67%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在分子性质预测中对化学结构推理能力有限，因为SMILES等分子表示与LLM主要训练的自然语言存在语义和化学知识差距，需要弥合这一鸿沟。

Method: 提出MolE-RAG框架，在推理时融合三种互补的上下文信息：检索的化学文献、分子特异性信息（同义词、标识符、官能团注释、物化描述符）以及从训练集中检索的结构相似分子，无需模型微调。

Result: 在9个分子性质预测任务上，MolE-RAG在分类任务中ROC-AUC最高提升28个百分点，回归任务中RMSE相对降低67%。不同上下文来源的效用因模型和任务而异。

Conclusion: 以分子为中心的检索增强可以在不进行模型微调的情况下提升LLM的分子性质预测能力，为在推理时集成异构化学知识提供了灵活框架。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for molecular property prediction, but their ability to reason over chemical structures remains limited, as molecular representations such as SMILES differ substantially from the natural language on which LLMs are primarily trained. To bridge this semantic and chemical knowledge gap, we propose MolE-RAG, a training-free, molecule-centric retrieval-augmented generation framework for LLM-based molecular property prediction. MolE-RAG augments each prediction with three complementary sources of inference-time context: retrieved chemistry literature, molecule-specific information including compound synonyms, identifiers, functional group annotations, and physicochemical descriptors, and structurally similar molecules retrieved from the training set. We evaluate MolE-RAG across nine molecular property prediction tasks using proprietary, chemistry-specialized, and open-source LLMs. Across general-purpose LLMs, MolE-RAG improves ROC-AUC by up to 28 percentage points on classification tasks and reduces regression RMSE by up to 67% relative to a SMILES-only baseline. We further find that the utility of each context source varies across models and tasks, with different models benefiting most from textual retrieval, molecular context, or structural retrieval. These results suggest that molecule-centric retrieval can improve LLM-based molecular property prediction without model fine-tuning while providing a flexible framework for integrating heterogeneous chemical knowledge at inference time.

</details>


### [363] [REGEN: Reference-Guided Synthetic Multivariate Time Series Generation for Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05264)
*Moulik Gupta,Dhruv Kumar,Murari Mandal,Saurabh Deshpande*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ReGeN是一个参考引导的生成管道，将观测序列分解为周期性骨干、随机残差和跨变量依赖三个可解释组件，通过可控温度采样生成多样化且保留领域结构的合成时间序列数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的时间序列生成方法（如CauKer、TimePFN、TimeGAN等）无法在数据稀缺场景下同时保证生成数据的领域特异性和结构可控性，缺乏对周期性结构、局部变异和跨变量动力学的显式控制。

Method: ReGeN将参考序列分解为三个可解释组件：1）相位对齐的周期性骨干（捕获主领域形态）；2）基于深度核高斯过程的逐变量随机残差；3）通过结构因果模型注入的滞后感知跨变量依赖。通过可控温度对这些组件进行采样，实现分布覆盖范围的扩展。

Result: ReGeN生成的数据几乎无预测退化地替代真实兄弟数据；在强周期性领域（如交通）甚至超越真实数据；基于ReGeN语料库预训练的基模型优于基于先验和数据驱动的合成替代方案。

Conclusion: 在低数据场景下，如何结构化地利用参考数据与拥有多少数据同等重要。ReGeN通过可解释的结构分解实现了领域约束下的可控合成。

Abstract: Training robust multivariate time series forecasting models requires large, diverse corpora, yet many real-world domains provide only a handful of observed sequences. Existing generators fail to resolve this mismatch: prior-based approaches (e.g., CauKer, TimePFN) produce domain-agnostic samples, while data-driven methods (e.g., TimeGAN) treat references as black-box supervision, forfeiting explicit control over periodic structure, local variability, and cross-variable dynamics.
  We propose ReGeN, a reference-guided generative pipeline that treats observed sequences not as examples to imitate, but as structural scaffolds for controllable synthesis. ReGeN decomposes each reference into three interpretable components: a phase-aligned periodic backbone capturing dominant domain morphology; per-variable stochastic residuals modeled with a deep-kernel Gaussian process; and lag-aware cross-variable dependencies injected through a structural causal model with fitted coupling coefficients. Sampling these components at controllable temperature broadens distributional coverage while preserving domain-grounded structure.
  We show that ReGeN-generated data consistently substitutes for real sibling data with minimal forecasting degradation, and in strongly periodic domains such as traffic, can outperform the real source itself. We further show that a foundation model pretrained on ReGeN corpora outperforms those pretrained on prior-based and data-driven synthetic alternatives. This suggests that in low-data regimes, how reference data is structurally exploited can matter as much as how much data is available.

</details>


### [364] [Data-efficient flood depth prediction through domain-aware coreset selection and tabular foundation models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05265)
*Lipai Huang,Adithi Srinath,Manas Singh,Junwei Ma,Ali Mostafavi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于领域感知的核心集构建方法，利用表格基础模型在推理时进行洪水深度预测。仅用0.7%的训练数据即可达到监督参考模型98.5%的性能（R²=0.663 vs 0.673），且无需针对每个流域重新训练即可迁移到新流域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近实时洪水深度预测需要既准确又快速且可跨流域迁移的代理模型，但现有监督式代理模型需要每个流域数百万训练样本且无法外推到新网格。

Method: 提出领域感知核心集构建流程：①按回归周期和受影响流域对风暴分层；②使用目标感知空间选择器采样六边形；③在推理时条件化表格基础模型。仅使用每个流域0.7%的训练数据。

Result: 在休斯顿地区9个流域上，平均R²=0.663，达到监督参考（R²=0.673）的98.5%。无需重训练即可迁移到未见的流域，在远分布外真实风暴上超越监督参考。

Conclusion: 领域感知核心集构建使得表格基础模型能够实现数据高效、跨流域可迁移的洪水预测，无需每个流域单独训练。

Abstract: Near-real-time flood depth prediction demands surrogate models that are accurate, fast, and transferable across watersheds. Supervised surrogates can match physics-based simulators in accuracy but need millions of training rows per watershed and cannot extrapolate beyond their original mesh. We propose a domain-aware coreset construction pipeline that conditions a tabular foundation model at inference time. The pipeline stratifies storms by return period and most-affected watershed, then samples hexagons with a target-aware spatial selector. With 0.7% of the per-watershed training pool, the model attains a mean $R^2$ of 0.663 across nine Houston-area watersheds, within 98.5% of the supervised reference ($R^2$ = 0.673). It transfers to held-out watersheds without task-specific retraining, staying ahead of a coreset-trained supervised baseline. On real storms it exceeds the supervised reference on a far out-of-distribution case and trails it on a mostly in-distribution one. Domain-aware coreset construction lets tabular foundation models deliver data-efficient, watershed-transferable flood predictions without per-watershed training.

</details>


### [365] [Sharp Low-Degree Thresholds for Planted-vs-Planted Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05266)
*Anda Skeja,Daniel Gutiérrez Espinoza,Fiona Skerman,Alexander S. Wein*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次建立了 planted-vs-planted 设置中低度多项式检验的精确阈值，证明了 planted submatrix 和 planted dense subgraph 模型中计数社区的匹配上下界，并开发了基于潜变量展开的非信号贡献修剪框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决 planted-vs-planted 设置中低度多项式检验缺乏精确阈值的问题，区分弱检验（平滑过渡）与强检验（尖锐阈值）的差异。

Method: 构建基于潜变量展开的框架，将低度恢复方法扩展到检验问题，并引入新的非信号贡献识别与修剪技术。

Result: 获得了 planted submatrix 和 planted dense subgraph 模型中低度检验的精确常数级阈值，该阈值与已知的低度恢复阈值一致；同时刻画了弱检验的光滑转变现象。

Conclusion: 在 planted-vs-planted 检验中，强检验存在尖锐阈值且与恢复阈值重合，而弱检验则呈现平滑过渡，表明不同检验任务之间存在本质差异。

Abstract: We establish the first sharp thresholds for low-degree polynomial tests in planted-vs-planted settings, where the goal is to determine with vanishing error which of two structured planted mechanisms generated the observed data. We prove matching low-degree upper and lower bounds for counting communities in the planted submatrix and planted dense subgraph models. The resulting testing threshold coincides, down to the sharp constant, with the known low-degree recovery threshold. In contrast, the task of weak testing, where the goal is to outperform random guessing, does not have a sharp threshold but rather a smooth transition, which we identify. To prove our results, we develop a framework for planted-vs-planted testing that builds on a latent-variable expansion originating in low-degree recovery and employs new methods to identify and prune non-signal contributions.

</details>


### [366] [Learning Manifold and Itô Dynamics with Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05272)
*Luke Thompson,Dai Shi,Lequan Lin,Junbin Gao,Andi Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出分支神经粗糙微分方程（B-NRDEs），通过Hopf代数框架统一处理欧几里得Itô、流形上协变导数及Stratonovich三类随机微分方程，在保持粗粒度计算效率的同时，首次使Itô动力学中的二次变分项可学习，并在多个复杂动力学任务上取得更优效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NRDEs依赖shuffle代数（对应Stratonovich微积分），无法处理Itô动力学所需的二次变分项，也无法处理流形上带联络的有序协变导数。作者希望提出一个统一的代数框架，使粗粒度数值积分能与底层微积分类型匹配。

Method: 用Grossman-Larson根系树代数匹配欧几里得Itô动力学，用Munthe-Kaas-Wright平面有根树匹配流形上有序协变导数，用shuffle代数匹配经典Stratonovich情形；并提出分支签名核损失函数，使二次变分项在训练中可见。

Result: 在粗糙Bergomi波动率、sim-to-real SO(3)动力学预测、SPD协方差动力学三个任务上，B-NRDEs均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: B-NRDEs提供了一个统一的、有效的框架，能够处理欧几里得-Stratonovich设定之外的随机与流形值动力学问题。

Abstract: Neural rough differential equations (NRDEs) stay accurate under irregular sampling while taking far fewer integration steps than standard neural differential equations, summarising a finely sampled driver by its log-signature and advancing the hidden state over coarse intervals using the log-ODE method. This efficiency rests on the shuffle algebra, the algebraic counterpart of Stratonovich calculus. This reliance means NRDEs cannot expose the quadratic-variation terms Itô dynamics require, nor the ordered covariant derivatives that govern Itô flows on connection-equipped manifolds. Ameliorating this, we introduce Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations (B-NRDEs), a Hopf-algebraic framework that recasts the NRDE log-ODE step as geometric numerical integration on the state-space manifold, matching the driving algebra to the governing calculus: Grossman--Larson rooted trees for Euclidean Itô dynamics, Munthe-Kaas--Wright planar rooted trees for ordered covariant derivatives on manifolds, and the shuffle algebra in the classical Stratonovich case. This yields intrinsic coarse-step dynamics that exactly preserve manifold constraints. Finally, we introduce a branched signature-kernel objective to enable Itô-consistent law matching by making quadratic-variation terms visible during training. On rough Bergomi volatility, sim-to-real $\mathrm{SO}(3)$ dynamics forecasting, and SPD covariance dynamics, B-NRDEs offer a unified, effective approach to stochastic and manifold-valued dynamics beyond the Euclidean--Stratonovich setting.

</details>


### [367] [Anomaly Detection for Electro-Hydrostatic Actuators using LSTM Autoencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05274)
*Nehal Afifi,Abdelmonem Elhendawi,Felix Leitenberger,Nadine Piat,Sven Matthiesen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于LSTM自编码器的离线异常检测框架，用于电静液作动器（EHA）传感器信号（温度、压力），在多种故障注入场景下达到平均99.0%的准确率，F1分数93.1%-99.8%，有效解决了传统方法无法捕捉时序依赖、误报率高的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EHA系统中传感器数据量大、采样频率高，传统统计和机器学习方法（如Z-score、IQR、Isolation Forest等）无法捕捉时序依赖，检测精度低、误报率高；且缺乏对不同工况下数据驱动方法的系统性评估。

Method: 采用基于重建的LSTM自编码器进行离线异常检测，通过验证集的重建误差分布进行校准与评估，在受控测试台采集的温度和压力单变量传感器信号上开展实验。

Result: 平均准确率99.0%，精确率最高达100%，召回率90.2%-99.6%，F1分数93.1%-99.8%，在多种故障注入场景下均表现出高检测灵敏度与极低误报率。

Conclusion: 验证了数据驱动离线异常检测在EHA系统中的可行性；未来工作将把框架适配到在线（实时）环境中。

Abstract: Electro-Hydrostatic Actuators (EHAs) are widely used in aerospace and industrial systems, where timely detection of sensor anomalies is essential to ensure safe and reliable operation. However, the large volume and high sampling frequency of EHA sensor data pose challenges for accurate and efficient anomaly detection. Conventional statistical and classical machine-learning methods such as Z-score, Interquartile Range (IQR), Median Absolute Deviation (MAD), Isolation Forest, Gaussian Mixture, and k-means often fail to capture the temporal dependencies inherent in EHA signals, resulting in limited detection accuracy and elevated false-alarm rates. Furthermore, systematic evaluations of data-driven anomaly detection approaches for EHA systems remain scarce, particularly under varying operational conditions. This study presents an offline anomaly-detection framework for univariate EHA sensor signals, focusing on temperature and pressure data collected from a controlled test bench. The method employs a reconstruction-based Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) autoencoder, calibrated and evaluated using validation-set reconstruction-error distributions. Performance is assessed across multiple fault-injection scenarios using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score, complemented by sensitivity analyses under varying operating conditions. The LSTM autoencoder achieved an average accuracy of 99.0\%, precision up to 100\%, recall between 90.2\% and 99.6\%, and F1-scores from 93.1\% to 99.8\%, demonstrating high detection sensitivity and a very low false-alarm rate across all evaluated sensors. These results highlight the feasibility of data-driven offline anomaly detection for EHAs. Future work will focus on adapting the developed framework for an online (real-time) environment.

</details>


### [368] [Agentic Monte Carlo: Simulating Reinforcement Learning for Black-Box Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05296)
*Dae Yon Hwang,Raunaq Suri,Valentin Villecroze,Anthony L. Caterini,Jesse C. Cresswell,Noël Vouitsis,Brendan Leigh Ross*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Agentic Monte Carlo (AMC)方法，利用强化学习与贝叶斯推理的等价性，通过顺序蒙特卡洛采样直接优化黑盒LLM代理的策略，无需访问模型参数，在AgentGym基准上超越了提示基线甚至GRPO方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 黑盒LLM代理（如专有API模型）无法进行参数级优化，传统的强化学习方法对其不适用。作者希望在不修改模型参数的前提下，实现对黑盒代理的策略优化。

Method: 利用RL与贝叶斯推理的等价性，将最优策略建模为轨迹的后验分布，以固定黑盒LLM代理为先验，通过顺序蒙特卡洛(SMC)采样该后验分布，并学习一个值函数来引导代理行为，同时保持底层黑盒模型不变。

Result: 在AgentGym基准的三个不同环境中，AMC显著优于提示基线方法，并且在扩展测试时计算量时甚至超过了GRPO的性能。

Conclusion: AMC证明了在不对模型参数进行优化的情况下，对黑盒LLM代理进行原则性的RL风格优化是可行的。

Abstract: LLM agents operate in two distinct regimes: open-weight agents amenable to reinforcement learning (RL) and black-box agents whose behaviour must be controlled purely at test time. Although black-box agents are often backed by state-of-the-art proprietary LLMs, API-only access precludes parameter-level optimization, rendering most RL methods inapplicable. To address this limitation, we turn to a known equivalence between RL and Bayesian inference. We propose Agentic Monte Carlo (AMC) to directly sample from the optimal policy of a black-box agent rather than training it through RL. The optimal policy is a posterior over trajectories whose prior we define as the fixed black-box LLM agent. We employ Sequential Monte Carlo to sample from this posterior by learning a value function to steer the agent while leaving the underlying black-box model unchanged. We validate AMC on three diverse environments from the AgentGym benchmark, demonstrating significant improvements over prompting baselines and even outperforming Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as we scale the test-time compute of our method. AMC demonstrates the feasibility of performing principled RL-style optimization of black-box LLM agents. Code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/Agentic-Monte-Carlo

</details>


### [369] [Multimarginal flow matching with optimal transport potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05327)
*Raghav Kansal,David Crair,Nghia Nguyen,Scott Pope,Bradley Parry*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了OTP-FM方法，通过将动态最优传输中的势项引入条件流匹配学习目标，实现了在多中间边际分布约束下的高效、无模拟的多边际流匹配算法，在单细胞RNA测序、海洋学和气象学数据集上取得了最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流匹配方法主要关注两个端点分布之间的传输，但在许多科学领域中存在中间观测边际分布（如时间序列数据），这些中间分布可以约束端点之间的流动。如何有效地利用这些多边际信息来学习更准确的动态传输映射是一个尚未充分探索的问题。

Method: 利用流匹配与动态最优传输之间的联系，通过向动态最优传输作用量中添加势项来软性引导流经过中间边际分布；将条件流匹配学习目标扩展到包含这些势项，从而得到一个高效、无模拟的多边际流匹配算法（OTP-FM）。

Result: 在单细胞RNA测序、海洋学和气象学等多个科学数据集上，OTP-FM实现了最先进的性能和训练效率。

Conclusion: 通过结合动态最优传输中的势项，OTP-FM在保持训练高效性的同时，为学习时空动态提供了显著灵活性，是多边际流匹配问题的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Flow matching (FM) has emerged as a powerful framework for learning dynamic transport maps between two empirical distributions. However, less explored is the setting with intermediate observed marginals that can help constrain the flows between the endpoints. This "multimarginal" regime is central to modeling temporal evolution in dynamical systems in many scientific domains that can sample sequential distributions. We tackle this problem with a novel approach that leverages the connection between FM and dynamic optimal transport (OT), softly steering the flow towards the intermediate marginals through potential terms in the dynamic OT action. By extending the conditional FM learning target to incorporate these potentials, we derive an efficient, simulation-free algorithm for multimarginal FM that offers considerable flexibility in the spatiotemporal dynamics of the learned flows.
